title: Sales Manager HPE Networking
description:
Sales Manager HPE Networking  



This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.**Who We Are:**


Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.

**Job Description:**

  



**Job Family Definition:**


Leads the sales team to drive growth and profitability. Builds a high-performing team, manages sales execution and forecasting, and strengthens customer and partner relationships. Supports complex deals and drives pipeline growth aligned with HPE strategy.

**Management Level Definition:**


Manages a sales team and is accountable for results (revenue, people, operations). Provides guidance, drives execution, and supports team development. Typically reports to Director level.

**Additional guidance/criteria:**

* Manages and controls activities within a single country (Sweden)
* Manages a team of ~8–15 people

**Responsibilities:**

**Managing the Business:**

* **Sales coverage** – Build targeted business plans and allocate resources to drive sales and margins; collaborate across teams to prioritize and direct activities.
* **Account planning** – Support sales strategy and processes; align account plans with corporate strategy; manage geography plans to meet revenue targets; ensure accurate forecasting, progress tracking, and regular reviews.
* **Pipeline management** – Build, track, and manage a healthy pipeline (short and long term); monitor size, quality, and win/loss performance.
* **Deal management** – Review deals to ensure quality and smooth execution; track deal progress and governance.
* **Business acumen** – Apply business, financial, and legal understanding to improve performance and align operations with company direction.
* **Strategic sales planning & implementation** – Develop and execute sales strategies to grow market share and drive profitable growth.
* **Competitive positioning** – Use market insights to strengthen positioning and counter competitors in customer engagements.

**Leading & Managing Sales People**

* **Coaching & performance management** – Manage and develop team performance; support individuals through challenges and drive results across all performers.
* **Leadership** – Lead by example; motivate and support teams in winning and closing deals.
* **People development** – Drive skill development to increase team productivity and impact.
* **Change management** – Lead the team effectively through change and transformation.
* **Attract and hire top talent to the team**

**Selling as a Sales Manager:**

* **Strategic direction** – Align team activities with company strategy and support solution positioning based on customer needs.
* **C-level engagement** – Build strong relationships with senior customer stakeholders and decision-makers.
* **Consultative selling** – Coach teams on identifying and advancing opportunities; support client engagements and ensure access to the right resources.
* **Industry & client knowledge** – Stay up to date on market trends and customer challenges; position solutions aligned to business needs.

**Your profile:**

**Education and Experience Required:**

* Proven sales leadership experience with strong results
* Project management skills
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent
* 7+ years experience in IT sales
* Fluency in both English and Swedish are required

**Knowledge and Skills**

* **Business Management:** Proven ability to execute sales strategy and manage pipeline, forecasting, and overall performance
* **Sales Development**: Demonstrated experience in mobilizing resources, driving sales execution, growing key accounts, and hiring top talent
* **Workforce Management & Development**: Strong people management skills, including performance management, coaching, and team development
* **Customer Engagement**: Proven ability to build strong customer relationships and drive high levels of customer satisfaction
* **Strategic Business Planning**: Experience managing revenue and margins, with a focus on identifying and driving strategic growth opportunities
* **Sales Team / Individual Coaching**: Strong coaching and mentoring capabilities; ability to support deals, align team priorities, and drive results

**Additional Skills:**


Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Assertiveness, Bias, Building Rapport, Buyer Personas, Coaching, Complex Sales, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Experience Strategy, Customer Interactions, Design Thinking, Empathy, Financial Acumen, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Identifying Sales Opportunities, Industry Knowledge, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity {+ 6 more}**What We Can Offer You:**

**Health & Wellbeing**


We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.

**Personal & Professional Development**


We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.

**Unconditional Inclusion**


We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.

**Let's Stay Connected:**


Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.

We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. title: Principal GenAI GTM Specialist, WWSO
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Are you a customer-obsessed builder with a passion for helping enterprises unlock transformative value from Generative AI? Do you combine deep technical proficiency in GenAI — foundation models, Amazon Bedrock, agentic architectures — with the business acumen to land AI transformation programmes tied to real customer outcomes? Do you thrive at the intersection of technology strategy and commercial execution? Join the EMEA Go-to-Market Specialist Team to lead the GenAI transformation agenda across one of AWS's highest-growth and most strategic domains.  

  

The Worldwide Specialist Organization (WWSO) is part of AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS). We work backwards from our customers' most complex and business-critical problems to build and execute go-to-market plans that turn AWS ideas into multi-billion-dollar businesses. WWSO teams include business development, specialist solutions architecture, and go-to-market.  

  

This is a Principal-level GenAI GTM Specialist role responsible for driving enterprise Generative AI adoption across EMEA. Rather than owning a single service, you will own the cross-cutting GenAI transformation narrative — spanning Amazon Bedrock, agentic architectures, foundation model strategy, and emerging GenAI capabilities — and translate it into use-case-led motions that land measurable business outcomes in customers.  

  

What We're Looking For  

* Deep technical proficiency in Generative AI: foundation models, agentic patterns, and the Amazon Bedrock ecosystem.
* Demonstrated ability to land AI/ML transformation programmes in enterprise customers translating technology capability into business outcomes by use case.
* A blend of technical depth and commercial savvy equally comfortable whiteboarding a Think Big architecture and presenting an AI strategy to a C-suite.
* Experience building and executing GTM strategies at scale in a fast-moving technology domain.


Track record of operating as a thought leader and trusted advisor to senior customer stakeholders.  

* Ability to thrive in a high-ambiguity, high-velocity environment and shape direction without waiting for permission
* Data-driven approach to prioritization using pipeline data, propensity signals, and market intelligence to focus effort where it matters most
* Experience in enterprise technology sales, solutions architecture, or technical business development with a focus on AI/ML or cloud platforms
* Strong written and verbal communication able to author SLT-level narratives, field-facing plays, and customer-facing positioning with equal fluency

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Own the EMEA GenAI GTM strategy end-to-end driving enterprise adoption of Amazon Bedrock and complementary GenAI services through use case led motion, define the narrative, identify high-impact use-case patterns.
* Land AI transformation in enterprises: develop and execute account-level GenAI strategies for priority industries, mapping business priorities to GenAI use cases, building transformation roadmaps, and guiding customers from proof-of-concept to production at scale.
* Operate at the CxO/VP and practitioner level: engage senior business leaders on AI strategy and value realisation while simultaneously working with developers, ML engineers, and architects on technical solution design and adoption patterns.
* Build and execute scaled GTM programmes : design motions including customer roundtables, GenAI workload assessments, use-case workshops, developer engagement, and regional campaigns that create demand and accelerate adoption.
* Thought Leadership : Create packaged deliverables (propensity models, use-case frameworks) and drive enablement that raises the bar across the EMEA field.
* Be the voice of EMEA customers to Product: synthesise regional customer requirements, competitive signals, and adoption blockers into actionable feedback that shapes Amazon Bedrock and GenAI service roadmaps.
* Influence Marketing: co-develop thought leadership, digital campaigns, and customer success stories that position AWS as the platform of choice for enterprise GenAI transformation.
* Drive cross-functional alignment across Specialist, Field, Partner, and Marketing teams to ensure consistent messaging and coordinated execution

  

A day in the life  

You will lead the go-to-market strategy for one of the most exciting and high-growth domains in cloud. No two days are the same. You might start your morning on a deep-dive with a Fortune 500 financial services CTO mapping their enterprise-wide GenAI transformation roadmap — identifying the highest-value use cases, from intelligent document processing to autonomous customer service agents. After lunch, you're running a use-case workshop with a major retailer's engineering team, helping them see how Amazon Bedrock can power their next-generation product discovery experience and building the business case to take to their board. Later, you're jumping into a pipeline review with an Area AI/ML sales leader to pressure-test which opportunities are ready to move from pilot to production, before briefing a product team on what EMEA customers need next from Bedrock based on patterns you're seeing across dozens of enterprise engagements.  

  

You'll collaborate daily with account teams, solution architects, partner managers, and AWS service teams — connecting the dots between customer business priorities, GenAI technical capabilities, and market opportunity. Your job is to make the complex simple: translating the art of the possible in Generative AI into concrete, use-case-led transformation programmes that customers can execute and measure. You operate as the connective tissue between what AWS builds and how enterprises adopt it at scale.  

  

About the team  

The EMEA WWSO AI/ML Geo Specialist team within AWS's Worldwide Specialist Organization owns and executes go-to-market strategy for the full portfolio of AWS AI/ML services. We serve customers across the complete AI lifecycle while also leading the way to drive net new innovative use cases in this domain. Our customers include some of the most technically sophisticated organizations in the world, and our work directly impacts how AI is built and deployed across EMEA.  

You will join a team of passionate builders who combine deep technical curiosity with commercial acumen. We operate with a startup mentality inside one of the world's largest technology companies—moving fast, experimenting boldly, and holding ourselves to the highest standards.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Experience in Go-To-Market, Business Development, Sales, or Consulting
* Experience developing strategies that influence leadership decisions at the organizational level
* Demonstrated technical proficiency in Generative AI concepts with the ability to credibly engage technical and business audiences.

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience selling to Fortune 1000 or Global 2000 organizations
* Background that blends technical depth with commercial ownership (pipeline, revenue, GTM planning).

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Technical Account Manager, Google Cloud Consulting (English, Swedish)
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 2 years of experience in a customer-facing role, technical-adjacent role, or IT consulting, assisting with technical implementations, project coordination, or customer success.
* Experience (including internships or academic projects) in technical support, IT operations, escalation coordination, or cloud technologies.
* Ability to communicate in English and Swedish fluently to support client relationship management in this region.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Master’s degree in a Technical, Engineering, or Business field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Cloud certifications (e.g., Google Cloud Associate Cloud Engineer).
* Experience collaborating with internal cross-functional teams, channel partners, or external stakeholders to solve problems and deliver projects.
* Familiarity with cloud concepts, with an eagerness to learn about application or workload migration to public cloud providers.
* Understanding of one of the following: IT operations, database systems, networking, IT security, application development, service architecture, or cloud-native application development.
* Excellent written and verbal communication, presentation, and problem-solving skills.

**About the job**
-----------------


As a Technical Account Manager (TAM), you will draw on technical acumen to help customers successfully adopt Google Cloud products. Your previous experience with cloud infrastructure, program management, enterprise technology implementation, strategy development and customer advocacy will play a critical part in your day-to-day work driving success at our most critical customers.  


In this role, you will lead the successful adoption of Google Cloud at leading organizations, guiding them through the technical facets of their Cloud transformation journey. You will drive customer adoption of Google Cloud services, like Google Compute Engine, Vertex AI, Google Kubernetes Engine, BigQuery, Workspace and many more. You will regularly engage with stakeholder groups, including executives of large enterprises and a cross-functional and geographically dispersed team. You will utilize their relationship management skills and technical credibility to effectively communicate at all levels of the organization, establishing themselves as a trusted advisor. You will also travel domestically and internationally up to 10% of the time as needed.
Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Accelerate customer adoption of Google Cloud by leading the implementation journey. Provide technical guidance and manage timelines, milestones, migration goal and business transformation strategies.
* Develop relationships with key stakeholders to understand a customer’s business and develop roadmaps. Lead quarterly business reviews and executive sessions to better understand business and technical needs.
* Plan for customer events and launches, partnering with Support, Engineering and Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) to ensure customer success during critical moments. Work with customers and Support to guide issues and escalations to resolution.
* Develop best practices and assets based on learnings from customer engagements to help support initiatives to scale through partners and accelerate cloud adoption.
* Advocate for customer needs in order to overcome adoption blockers and drive new feature development. Lead across multiple work streams and teams to maintain customer momentum.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Outcome Customer Engineer, Google Cloud Platform Delivery
description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 10 years of experience with cloud native architecture in a customer-facing or support role.
* Experience in deployment planning, orchestration, or change management.
* Experience in programming languages, debugging, or systems design.
* Experience engaging with, presenting to, or influencing technical stakeholders or executive leaders.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Experience selling technical solutions in one or more of the following areas: Infrastructure Modernization, Application Modernization, Data Management, Data Analytics, AI, Networking, Migrations or Security.
* Experience with Google Cloud products and differentiation from competition.
* Experience working with product and capacity teams to resolve technical and capacity blockers.
* Experience with object-oriented programming languages (i.e. Python, Java), and using technical proficiencies to remove blockers and accelerate customer deployment.

**About the job**
-----------------


When leading companies choose Google Cloud, it's a huge win for spreading the power of cloud computing globally. Once educational institutions, government agencies, and other businesses sign on to use Google Cloud products, you come in to facilitate making their work more productive, mobile, and collaborative. You listen and deliver what is most helpful for the customer. You assist fellow sales Googlers by problem-solving key technical issues for our customers. You liaise with the product marketing management and engineering teams to stay on top of industry trends and devise enhancements to Google Cloud products.



As a Google Cloud Platform (GCP) Outcome Customer Engineer (OCE), you will drive initial and ongoing business ramp for our customers, clearing blockers and ensuring they get the maximum benefit from their investment faster. You will manage and execute the deployment plan, transitioning scoped workloads into production by providing technical leadership to customers and partners. You will have a direct impact on the velocity and incremental consumption of customer workloads, leading to accelerated value realization, higher adoption, and future expansion opportunities.  

  

You will blend sales expertise, market knowledge, direct technical engagement, and technical project management to prove the value of the Google Cloud portfolio.


Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Develop and orchestrate a structured, end-to-end deployment plan across customer, professional services, and partner teams, onboarding the implementation team, clearing blockers, managing timelines and progress, and ensuring readiness (e.g., capacity, training).
* Employ coding, debugging, or systems design to resolve technical blockers and accelerate deployment.
* Drive and track progress of the initial and ongoing ramp of workloads, moving customers from agreement to consumption as quickly as possible.
* Identify expansion opportunities for new workloads within the account during project execution.
* Drive sustainable product usage to help customers realize value on an ongoing basis and secure future contract renewals.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Grafisk formgivare
description:
Tjänsten är placerad inom förvaltningen Verksamhetsstöd och service som är en av åtta förvaltningar i Linköpings kommun. Inom förvaltningen finns kommunens interna tjänster och servicefunktioner samlade. Vi bidrar till utveckling av kommunens verksamheter och kommunövergripande servicelösningar.

**Information om tjänsten**
---------------------------


**Sista ansökningsdag:** 15 juni 2026


**Referensnummer:** 17366


**Anställningsform:** Tillsvidareanställning

  

*Vill du förgylla vardagen och förbättra livskvaliteten för Linköpingsborna? Hos oss kan du göra en viktig skillnad och bidra till att göra Linköping till en bättre plats. Välkommen till oss!*

**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
------------------------


Är du en utpräglad formgivarnörd som älskar visuell produktion och pixelperfektion? Hos oss på Kommunikationsservice får du ett renodlat operativt och kreativt uppdrag där tyngdpunkten ligger på grafisk formgivning från grunden baserat på komplexa kundbriefar.


Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter innebär att producera allt från storskaligt tryck (såsom vepor och skyltar) och redaktionell design till digitalt innehåll anpassat för webb och sociala medier. En stor och viktig del av din vardag innebär också att kvalitetssäkra och korrigera material så att allt som lämnar enheten strikt följer Linköpings kommuns grafiska profil.


Du kommer att ingå i ett nära team tillsammans med text- och filmproducenter, där det är du som sätter de visuella grundelementen och skapar den fasta formen som enhetens animatörer sedan kan väcka till liv.

**Din arbetsplats**
-------------------


Kommunikationsservice är kommunens interna kommunikationsbyrå som erbjuder kommunikationstjänster till kommunens verksamheter och bolag. Här hjälper vi till från idé till färdig produktion. Bland annat inom film, foto och animation, ljudproduktion, grafisk formgivning, e-utbildning, skribentjobb, tillgänglighetsanpassningar av vissa dokument, webbpublicering, webbutbildning och annonsering via sociala medier.


Vi sitter i moderna lokaler i Ebbepark. Vi tillämpar förtroendetid och distansarbete i upp till två dagar i veckan när verksamheten tillåter.

**Du som söker**
----------------


Vi söker en expert på grafisk produktion. Vi söker dig som har en högskoleexamen inom grafisk design, kommunikation och media, eller annan utbildning/erfarenhet som vi bedömer som likvärdig.


Du har flerårig, dokumenterad och gedigen erfarenhet av operativt och kreativt arbete med grafisk formgivning och produktion. Du är van vid att tolka beställarens briefar och omsätta dem i slående visuell kommunikation. Har en bevisad förmåga att strikt följa, tillämpa och kvalitetssäkra material utifrån en given grafisk profil, och förmåga att se detta regelverk som en kreativ utmaning. Det är ett krav att du har goda kunskaper och stor vana av arbete i Adobe Creative Cloud. Som grafisk formgivare ser vi gärna att du har erfarenhet av att jobba med generativ AI (t.ex. Midjourney eller motsvarande verktyg). Det är starkt meriterande om du har erfarenhet av att arbeta på just en inhousebyrå eller liknande produktionsmiljö. Har du dessutom kunskap och erfarenhet inom animation eller film- och ljudproduktion, utöver din grafiska spets, är det meriterande. Det är också önskvärt om du har tidigare erfarenhet av arbete i en politiskt styrd organisation.


För tjänsten är det ett krav att du har goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift eftersom du kommer att producera material på svenska.


Som person är du idérik och kreativ inom givna ramar. Du har lätt för att spåna fram nya koncept, men har samtidigt den samarbetsförmåga som krävs för att tillgodose våra beställares behov. Vi ser att du både driver dina uppgifter på ett självständigt sätt och gillar att samarbeta, samt att du håller en hög servicegrad mot våra beställare. Vi tänker att du är helt prestigelös – du ser inte ramar och profiler som en begränsning, utan som en rolig utmaning. Du trivs i en specialistroll där du får nörda ner dig i det du är absolut bäst på: att skapa visuell form som gör skillnad i vardagen för våra beställare och kommuninvånare. Att hålla en hög leveranskvalitet är en hygienfaktor för dig. Rollen innebär stor variation – från större trycksaker och skyltmaterial till digitalt innehåll för webb och sociala medier.


I rekryteringen använder vi oss av personlighets- och problemlösningstester som en del i bedömningen.

**Övrig information**
---------------------

*När du söker en tjänst i Linköpings kommun registrerar du din ansökan genom inloggning via e-legitimation (såsom BankID eller FrejaID) istället för e-postadress. Saknar du e-legitimation? Vänligen kontakta ansvarig HR-konsult eller chef, så hjälper de dig att registrera din ansökan.*


Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse


Anställningsform: Tillsvidare


Sysselsättningsgrad: 100%


Antal lediga befattningar: 1


Ref. nr: 17366

*I denna ansökan bifogar du inget personligt brev*



**Tillsammans formar vi framtidsstaden**
----------------------------------------


Linköping är en av Europas mest innovativa städer och möjligheternas kommun. Med energi, mod och hjärta gör vi vår stad ännu bättre. Vi drivs av nyfikenheten och viljan att hitta nya lösningar. Och av att förgylla vardagen och förbättra livskvaliteten för våra invånare.

**Senast uppdaterad:**
2 jun 2026

title: Portfolio Manager
description:
We are looking for a Portfolio Manager to join us at Telia Cygate.


My name is Patrik Holmqvist, COO and I’m looking for someone who wants to grow together with us. We are a supportive and forward‑looking team focused on develop our portfolio to match the trending needs in our market.  



  

  

**What you’ll do:**

The Portfolio Manager is responsible for identifying market trends, emerging technologies, and evolving customer needs to drive the development and optimization of Telia Cygate’s portfolio. The role ensures that offerings remain competitive, relevant, and aligned with business strategy, translating market insights into new services and growth opportunities.  



  

  

**What will help you thrive in this role:**

* Strong commercial mindset and ability to build business cases.
* Proven ability to work across sales, technology, and business teams.
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills.
* Fluency in both Swedish and English is required.

  

  

**Why Telia Cygate?**

At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.


Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.


Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!


**Telia Cygate is proud to be certificated as Great Place to Work!**

With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.


**What we offer**

When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.


Interested? Apply!


We look forward to receiving your application by **2026-06-21** . Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!


Location: Växjö


If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our Talent Acquisition Partner. Background and reference checks will be part of the process


Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to Patrik Holmqvist at patrik.holmqvist@cygate.se


We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.


**Equal opportunities**

At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.


**Welcome to Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Kommunikatör
description:
Tjänsten är placerad inom förvaltningen Verksamhetsstöd och service som är en av åtta förvaltningar i Linköpings kommun. Inom förvaltningen finns kommunens interna tjänster och servicefunktioner samlade. Vi bidrar till utveckling av kommunens verksamheter och kommunövergripande servicelösningar.

**Information om tjänsten**
---------------------------


**Sista ansökningsdag:** 15 juni 2026


**Referensnummer:** 17365


**Anställningsform:** Tillsvidareanställning

  

*Vill du förgylla vardagen och förbättra livskvaliteten för Linköpingsborna? Hos oss kan du göra en viktig skillnad och bidra till att göra Linköping till en bättre plats. Välkommen till oss!*

**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
------------------------


I rollen som kommunikatör har du ett varierat uppdrag med fokus på operativt kommunikationsarbete i digitala kanaler. Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter innebär att ta fram, målgruppsanpassa och publicera material för både intern och extern kommunikation.


Du producerar innehåll för sociala medier; med fokus på bild och film, lättare redigering och tillhörande inläggstexter. Att kunna skapa, hantera och optimera annonsering i de vanligast förekommande sociala medierna ska vara din gata i stan. Att arbeta med webb och vårt intranät samt att skriva nyheter, korrekturläsa texter och producera enklare presentationer blir också en del av din arbetsvardag. Du kommer att arbeta med hela organisationen som arbetsfält – där du bland annat agerar kommunikativt stöd till HR och stöttar våra övriga förvaltningar. Du kan även komma att agera kommunikatör i större kommunikationsprojekt.


Jobbet är utåtriktat och innebär att du ibland åker på besök ute i våra verksamheter för att träffa människor, antingen i sällskap av kollegor eller i mer formella sammanhang med politiker. Då är det du som ansvarar för att fota och samla in material. Rollen innebär också ett stort eget ansvar för att hantera våra betalda kampanjer i sociala medier.


Du ingår regelbundet i olika projektgrupper och nätverk, både inom den egna enheten men även tvärfunktionellt ihop med kollegor på andra förvaltningar.

**Din arbetsplats**
-------------------


Kommunikationsservice är kommunens interna kommunikationsbyrå som erbjuder kommunikationstjänster till kommunens verksamheter och bolag. Här hjälper vi till från idé till färdig produktion. Bland annat inom film, foto och animation, ljudproduktion, grafisk formgivning, e-utbildning, skribentjobb, tillgänglighetsanpassningar av vissa dokument, webbpublicering, webbutbildning och annonsering via sociala medier.


Vi sitter i moderna lokaler i Ebbepark. Vi tillämpar förtroendetid och distansarbete i upp till två dagar i veckan när verksamheten tillåter. Visst arbete kommer att ske på obekväm arbetstid.

**Du som söker**
----------------


Vi söker nu en nyfiken och engagerad kommunikatör. Vi söker dig som har en högskoleexamen inom kommunikation och media, alternativt annan utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer likvärdig.


Du som söker har flerårig erfarenhet av arbete med kommunikation såväl internt som externt. Du har också erfarenhet av att producera texter och annat innehåll för publicering i digitala kanaler och i sociala medier, såväl som erfarenhet av att publicera och optimera kampanjer i de vanligaste sociala mediekanalerna. Vi ser också att du har erfarenhet av att arbeta med webbpubliceringsverktyg som exempelvis SiteVision. Du har också förmåga att följa en given grafisk profil, samt har kunskap inom Adobe Creative Cloud eller likvärdigt program.


Vidare ser vi gärna att du har erfarenhet av projektledning eller har varit drivande projektdeltagande inom kommunikation. Ett plus är att du tidigare arbetat med kommunikation inom HR-relaterade frågor, strategiskt kommunikationsarbete och tidigare erfarenhet av arbete i en politiskt styrd organisation. Du har med fördel också erfarenhet av film- och ljudproduktion och av kreativ copywriting.


För tjänsten är det ett krav att du har goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift eftersom du kommer att producera material på svenska. Vi ser det som meriterande om du har B-körkort då arbetet innebär resor till olika platser för reportage och inspelningar.


Som kommunikatör är du kvalitetsmedveten och lyhörd för kundens behov. Du blir en utmärkt byggsten i vårt team där tydlighet och kreativitet är viktiga drag hos dig som person. Du har ett förhållningssätt som är serviceinriktat och du trivs med att samarbeta med andra människor. Du lockas av att få hålla på med det du är specialist på, att kommunicera i en verksamhet där du verkligen gör skillnad i vardagen för våra beställare och slutligen våra kommuninvånare.


I rekryteringen använder vi oss av personlighet- och problemlösningstester som en del i bedömningen.

**Övrig information**
---------------------

*När du söker en tjänst i Linköpings kommun registrerar du din ansökan genom inloggning via e-legitimation (såsom BankID eller FrejaID) istället för e-postadress. Saknar du e-legitimation? Vänligen kontakta ansvarig HR-konsult eller chef, så hjälper de dig att registrera din ansökan.*


Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse


Anställningsform: Tillsvidare


Sysselsättningsgrad: 100%


Antal lediga befattningar: 1


Ref. nr: 17365

*I denna ansökan bifogar du inget personligt brev*



**Tillsammans formar vi framtidsstaden**
----------------------------------------


Linköping är en av Europas mest innovativa städer och möjligheternas kommun. Med energi, mod och hjärta gör vi vår stad ännu bättre. Vi drivs av nyfikenheten och viljan att hitta nya lösningar. Och av att förgylla vardagen och förbättra livskvaliteten för våra invånare.

title: Nordic Looker Practice Lead
description:
- Are you ready to shape the future of Business Intelligence across the Nordics?


At **Devoteam** , we deliver innovative technology consulting, and as a premier **Google Cloud Partner** we sit at the forefront of the data space. We are looking for a **Nordic Looker Practice Lead** to own our Looker capability, drive regional growth, and cement our position as the go-to partner for Google Cloud data solutions.


Reporting directly to our **Head of Data** , you will own the Looker strategy across the Nordic region. It is a hybrid role that combines technical mastery, strategic leadership, and alliance management.
  

  

Curious about our projects? We got you: Check out our success stories

  
**What you will do**

* **Grow the practice:** Lead and scale our Looker engagements across the Nordics, spot new business opportunities, and advise clients on modern analytics.
* **Own delivery quality:** Act as the guardian of technical excellence — set the standard for LookML development, review the team's work, and ensure our deliverables exceed client expectations.
* **Strengthen the Google alliance:** Build deep, trust-based relationships with Google's local and regional teams, positioning Devoteam as the preferred partner for selling, architecting, and delivering on Looker.
* **Mentor and lead:** Develop and upskill our data team, fostering a culture of continuous learning around the modern data stack.
* **Partner with sales:** Connect market trends with new Looker features and capabilities — including conversational analytics — to shape what we take to clients.

Want to know more? Check out our people stories on Youtube


  
**Who you are**

You are a seasoned data professional who lives and breathes data modelling. You understand that Looker isn't just a visualisation tool — it's a semantic layer that transforms how a business works with data.


* **Looker expertise:** Several years of hands-on experience designing, developing, and deploying enterprise Looker solutions. You know LookML deeply, and caching policies, PDTs, and hub-and-spoke architectures are second nature.
* **The modern data stack:** Strong proficiency on Google Cloud, specifically BigQuery — query optimisation and partitioning come naturally.
* **Solution architecture:** You design BI and analytics solutions end to end — from the warehouse and modelling layer, through the semantic layer, to consumption. You make deliberate trade-offs about where logic lives (dbt vs LookML and PDTs), how it's governed, and how it scales across teams and environments.
* **Data modelling and engineering:** Deep SQL knowledge and hands-on experience with transformation tools such as dbt.
* **Leadership and advisory:** A track record of leading technical teams and the confidence to command the room in stakeholder presentations.

**The ultimate bonus Conversational analytics:** Experience bridging data insights and natural language puts you at the very top of our list.


  
- Devoteam is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued and respected. We encourage applications from individuals with diverse backgrounds and experiences.



	* **Competitive Compensation:** Enjoy a competitive compensation package with an uncapped commission structure, rewarding your hard work and success.
	* **Comprehensive Benefits:** Benefit from comprehensive health insurance, a retirement plan, and generous paid time off.
	* **Growth Opportunities:** Take advantage of excellent opportunities for professional development and career advancement within our growing Google Cloud practice.
	* **Cutting-Edge Technology:** Work with the latest Google Cloud technologies and contribute to impactful projects that transform businesses.
	* **Dynamic Culture:** Be part of a dynamic, supportive, and collaborative team culture that values innovation and personal growth.
	* **Flexible Work Arrangements:** Enjoy flexible work arrangements that allow you to balance your professional and personal life.We do plenty of activities, like meet-ups, hackathons, and partnerships. Don’t lose any of them: follow us on LinkedIn and our Instagram page  



  

**Ready to lead the change?**

If you have the expertise to scale our Looker practice and the drive to partner with Google, we want to hear from you. Apply today.


Devoteam is an equal-opportunity employer. We welcome applications from people of all backgrounds and are committed to building an inclusive team.

title: Marketing Project Managers – Unpaid Internship
description:
- Are you a creative coordinator, a master of structure, and ready to take on the ultimate marketing challenge this fall? **This full-time internship runs from mid-August to mid-November and is based entirely at our office in Malmö.** We are looking for three driven **Marketing Project Manager Interns** to own Devoteam’s presence at one of Scandinavia's premier tech events: Øredev !


**About Us**  

Devoteam is a leading tech consulting firm, dedicated to guiding businesses through their digital transformation. We combine creativity, tech expertise, and business strategy to deliver innovative solutions.


Øredev is a proud part of the Devoteam family. It is one of the largest and most vibrant developer conferences in the Nordics, gathering tech enthusiasts, speakers, and innovators from all over the world to share knowledge and shape the future of IT.

  
**The Role**  

As one of our Marketing Project Manager Interns, you won't just be watching from the sidelines, you will be in the driver’s seat. Your main mission is to plan, coordinate, and execute Devoteam’s participation and booth experience at Øredev. While you will work closely with our Sales and Marketing team based in Malmö, you will also collaborate with all employees across Devoteam to bring this project to life.


**Your responsibilities will include:**

* **Concept & Creation:** Brainstorming and developing creative marketing concepts, activities, and promotional materials for the event.
* **Project Management:** Independently driving your parts of the project forward, keeping track of timelines, logistics, and stakeholders.
* **On-site Execution:** Being present to set up, manage, and tear down the event presence (yes, this means you need to be prepared for some physical teamwork and lifting heavy boxes!).

  
**Who Are You?**  

We are looking for three doers who love to bring ideas to life. To thrive in this role, we believe you:


* Are currently studying Marketing, Project Management, Event Planning, or a related field looking for a full-time internship.
* Are fluent in English (written and spoken), as it is our primary language for this project.
* Are driven, communicative, and comfortable independently managing your own project and responsibilities.
* Have a basic understanding of design tools such as Canva, Figma, or Adobe Creative Cloud (highly valued but all is not needed).
Are a team player who is not afraid to roll up your sleeves, whether it's designing a flyer or moving event gear.  
* 

  

**Crucial requirement: You must be fully available to work full-time during the peak event week, November 3–7.**


  
- **What We Offer**  

You will be part of a dynamic trio of interns integrated into the local Malmö team, getting hands-on experience with a large-scale international event. This is the perfect opportunity to build your portfolio, expand your network in the tech industry, and have a lot of fun along the way!


**Ready to join us?**

**Send in your application today! We look forward to hearing from you.**

title: Automotive Software Platform Verification Senior Engineer to Accenture Industry X
description:
ccenture is hiring an Automotive Software Platform Verification Senior Engineer to strengthen our automotive team in Gothenburg.
In this cross-functional role you will be on-site technical representative at customer location to provide direct support and contribute to developing and maintaining developer platform infrastructure and software-in-the-loop (SiL) environments. The role focuses on faster, more reliable, and more automated verification of embedded software. This role requires frequent presence at client premises in Gothenburg, thus we look for candidates having existing working permit/rights in Sweden or right to work in EU.


Industry X is Accenture’s capability focused on engineering and manufacturing transformation — it’s about how products are designed, built, connected, and operated across their entire lifecycle.

  

What You’ll Do

* For the Developer Platform, design and maintain a unified, hermetic developer container (Docker/OCI) for toolchains, build systems, SDKs and test runners (Linux, QNX, FreeRTOS, Android)
* Build and manage CI/CD pipelines; maintain container registry with versioned images and changelogs
* Establish a clear E2E developer journey: bring-up scripts, debugging workflows, log/trace collection
* Enable and optimize workloads on cloud infrastructure (AWS, Terraform)
* Enable developers and testers to work with embedded automotive software stacks in pure-software environments (software-in-the-loop, SiL)
* Implement multi-VM / container communication on protocol layers (Ethernet, SomeIP, CAN)
* Develop helper tools and integrate simulation models into the SiL environment
* As on-site customer interface, serve as on-site technical liaison; support integration, verification and vehicle testing at customer facilities
* Facilitate rapid issue identification, debugging and resolution; communicate feedback to development teams
* Provide hands-on support for software flashing, configuration and milestone reviews

title: Global Manager Demand Generation - AI
description:
**Company Description**  

IFS is a billion-dollar revenue company with 7000+ employees on all continents. Our leading AI technology is the backbone of our award-winning enterprise software solutions, enabling our customers to be their best when it really matters–at the Moment of Service™. Our commitment to internal AI adoption has allowed us to stay at the forefront of technological advancements, ensuring our colleagues can unlock their creativity and productivity, and our solutions are always cutting-edge.


At IFS, we’re flexible, we’re innovative, and we’re focused not only on how we can engage with our customers but on how we can make a real change and have a worldwide impact. We help solve some of society’s greatest challenges, fostering a better future through our agility, collaboration, and trust.


We celebrate diversity and understand our responsibility to reflect the diverse world we work in. We are committed to promoting an inclusive workforce that fully represents the many different cultures, backgrounds, and viewpoints of our customers, our partners, and our communities. As a truly international company serving people from around the globe, we realize that our success is tantamount to the respect we have for those different points of view.


By joining our team, you will have the opportunity to be part of a **global, diverse environment;** you will be joining a **winning team** with a **commitment to sustainability;** and a company where we get things done so that you can **make a positive impact** on the world.


We’re looking for innovative and original thinkers to work in an environment where you can **#MakeYourMoment** so that we can help others make theirs. With the power of our AI-driven solutions, we empower our team to change the status quo and make a real difference.


If you want to change the status quo, we’ll help you make your moment. Join Team Purple. Join IFS.

 **Job Description**  

Reporting directly into the AI Business Unit COO with a dotted-line relationship to the SVP Global Demand Generation, the Global Manager Demand Generation - AI is responsible for orchestrating, enabling, and executing demand generation for AI offerings across the enterprise globally. The role ensures tight alignment between Sales, Go-to-Market, and Marketing leaders across all regions and lines of business to drive predictable, high-quality AI pipeline and revenue outcomes.


This role has responsibility for enabling, achieving, and driving global AI demand generation across Marketing, BDR/BD, and Sales (including Partners & Channels), ensuring enterprise and AI Business Unit revenue objectives are achieved through at least the following;

* Global AI Industry and Solution TAM engagement through integrated campaigns
* Demand generation across AI solutions spanning core enterprise platforms, cloud, acquisitions, and customer expansion/success motions
* Exceeding value and KPI targets for AI pipeline creation, quality, and cover
* Effective global lead routing from Marketing, BDR/BD, Partners, and Ecosystem into Sales for opportunity acceptance
* Sales opportunity acceptance, prioritization, and allocation aligned to global AI GTM strategy
* Global opportunity qualification boards to approve/decline progression and resource allocation beyond early pipeline stages
* Opportunity disposition management to ensure timely progression, recycling, or closure across all regions
* High-quality AI pipeline progression across CQ+2+ through structured global pipeline reviews
* Opportunity quality and forecast integrity in CQ+1 in support of AI Business Unit and executive leadership
* CRM hygiene, AI pipeline visibility, and Sales KPI achievement through standardized global cadences
* Global demand generation reporting across Regions, Market Units, Teams, and AEs for AI


The primary goal of this position is to ensure Sales, Solution Specialists, BDRs, Strategic Revenue, and Marketing teams globally understand their responsibilities in AI-led demand generation and opportunity progression. The role ensures teams are enabled, aligned, and cadenced to maximize productivity and deliver a consistent, high-quality four- to six-quarter rolling AI pipeline across priority target accounts worldwide.

 **Qualifications**  

* Proven experience in B2B enterprise software, preferably with AI, data, cloud, or platform solutions strong understanding of global enterprise sales, marketing, and go-to-market models, including complex buying groups
* Proven ability to build strong internal partnerships across global Sales, Marketing, Product, and GTM leadership
* Extensive knowledge of demand generation, pipeline management, forecasting, and sales methodologies
* Excellent communication, influence, and stakeholder management skills across global, matrixed organizations
* Experience in industries such as Manufacturing, Construction, Energy, Aerospace & Defense, Asset-Intensive, or Field Service environments is a plus
* Strong project and program management capabilities with attention to detail and execution rigor
* Highly organized, analytical, and creative problem solver
* Self-starter with strong ownership mindset, initiative, and drive
* Ability to work independently while collaborating effectively across regions and functions

  

**Additional Information** *We embrace flexibility and hybrid work opportunities to support diverse needs and lifestyles, while also valuing inclusive workplace experiences. By fostering a sense of community, we drive innovation, strengthen connections, and nurture belonging. Our commitment ensures you can work in a way that suits you best, while also engaging with colleagues to share ideas and build meaningful relationships.*

title: Senior Business Operations Specialist
description:
**Company Description**
-----------------------


IFS is a billion-dollar revenue company with 7000+ employees on all continents. We deliver award winning enterprise software solutions through the use of embedded digital innovation and a single cloud-based platform to help businesses be their best when it really matters–at the Moment of Service™.


At IFS, we're flexible, we're innovative, and we're focused not only on how we can engage with our customers but on how we can make a real change and have a worldwide impact. We help solve some of society's greatest challenges, fostering a better future through our agility, collaboration, and trust.


We celebrate diversity and accept that there are so many different perspectives in this world. As a truly international company serving people from around the globe, we realize that our success is tantamount to the respect we have for those different points of view.


By joining our team, you will have the opportunity to be part of a global, diverse environment; you will be joining a winning team with a commitment to sustainability; and a company where we get things done so that you can make a positive impact on the world.


We're looking for innovative and original thinkers to work in an environment where you can #MakeYourMoment so that we can help others make theirs.


If you want to change the status quo, we'll help you make your moment. Join Team Purple. Join IFS.

**Job Description**
-------------------


This role will report to the Business Operations Global Head and will work with the Regional Management team to provide Business Operations function expertise including but not limited to:

* Support regional management on preparing data in advance for weekly forecast; Engage in the forecast call to present pipeline data, taking notes of the action items and driving execution.
* Ensure accuracy and transparency of CRM Data, enabling correct business decision making
* Support the Region on quarterly business reviews and other management presentations as requested
* Be a point of contact for sales team with regards to system access, CRM, reporting tools, and data.
* Onboarding and ongoing support for Sales Reps on the actual execution of the sales processes and ensuring compliance in each step.
* Play a key role in sales support and operations, regularly engaging with sales reps and diverse functions in the organization. Provide guidance in terms of process, pricing, and contracts
* Work with the regional team to analyze pipeline data and movement
* Follow up on deal actions and related updates with Sales rep. Ensuring the tools are properly updated by the respective sales rep and all opportunities are correctly reflected in CRM and the forecasting dashboard.
* Coordinate with other departments during the sales cycle and service delivery for the post-sales activities.
* Coordinate with the License Generation Team regarding the customer order. Attend to all their inquiries and provide the necessary clarifications
* Ensure CRM is updated with a complete set of documents i.e., Signed contracts, Pricing, Purchase Orders, Proof of delivery and other related documents.
* Ensure alignment with the global team on the product releases, sales process, and tools that need to be rolled out in the Region.
* Look for opportunities to improve standard operating processes for sales operations and be part of the project to improve these processes.
**Qualifications**
------------------


A Business Operations would be expected to have a strong skills in the following areas:

* Comprehension of the end-to-end sales process of the business
* Worked with and managed CRM in previous roles
* Strong understanding of AI tools and the ability to leverage them effectively in day-to-day operations
* Excellent excel skills
* Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, in English and French language - other languages is a plus.
* Good financial acumen
**Additional Information**
--------------------------


Your background will be:

* A similar role in a large software or technology organization in the given geography.
* Appreciation of and ability to work within a matrix environment
* Have previously designed, built and improved business processes
* Professional experience in Finance and/or Auditing

title: Paid Social Manager
description:
Since 2003, Lyko has grown from a small e-shop into a full-fledged beauty ecosystem, and we're continuing to build the best digital beauty experience in the Nordics and beyond. With over 87,000 products from 1,000+ brands, we're on a mission to elevate our digital experience — and Paid Social is where beauty and performance meet at full speed.
  
  

This is a global role. You'll be steering how social advertising drives growth across Meta, TikTok, Snapchat, and Pinterest, managing significant media investment where every krona is measured against the bottom line, and where brand and conversion have to pull in the same direction.
  
  

About the role
  
As Paid Social Manager, you own the direction and performance of Paid Social across markets and platforms. This isn't a role about boosting posts and watching reach. We're looking for someone who architects the ad-tech behind the channel — the feeds, the automation, the tracking — and then steers the algorithms hard toward business outcomes.
  
  

In practice, you set the strategy, own budget allocation across markets, and build the technical and creative-automation frameworks that let Paid Social scale. You'll manage the trade-off between brand building and hard performance targets (POAS/CoS), and defend how you've split the budget between the two. You'll think across channels. Paid Social connects to CRM and SEM, and you're accountable for performance against POAS and CoS targets, quarter after quarter, without losing sight of the wider customer journey.
  
  

**Your main responsibilities include:**  

**Building and governing the ad-tech stack:** data flow between social platforms and our cloud environment, server-side API integrations, and accurate attribution
  
Advanced feed management and Dynamic Product Ads (DPA) at scale, with automation across creative production, campaign management, and bidding
  
Partnering with CRM on first-party data — suppression, lookalikes, and re-engagement across paid and owned channels
  
Steering platform algorithms through high-value signals, and directing thumb-stopping creative through testing
  
Keeping data integrity tight (CAPI, Consent Mode) and staying ahead on new platforms and Alpha/Beta features
  
  

Who you are
  
Lyko moves fast and changes direction often. That's true of the business, and it's especially true of Paid Social, the platforms, the privacy landscape, and the creative formats all shift faster than most channels can keep up with. We need someone who's energised by that, not worn down by it.
  
**You've probably spent years on the performance side of social:** feeds, automation, server-side tracking, attribution. And you've developed real opinions about creative along the way. You can argue for a creative direction in front of brand, and defend a bidding strategy in front of analysts. You're used to working across platforms and markets, and you're drawn to roles where the scope is wide and the autonomy real.
  
  

**In other words you have:**  

A background in senior Paid Social strategy across Meta, TikTok, Snapchat, Pinterest — ideally global or multi-market
  
Experience with account structuring, bidding strategies, and audience segmentation at scale
  
Hands-on experience with feed management and Dynamic Product Ads (DPA)
  
Experience with ad-tech and automation
  
Experience with attribution across GA4, BigQuery, ideally MMM
  
A clear point of view on creative and the ability to argue for it
  
Strong commercial instinct in the brand-vs-performance trade-off
  
The confidence to argue your position with brand people, analysts, and leadership — and the maturity to change your mind when someone makes a better point
  
A self-led way of working — you don't wait for someone to set your priorities, you make a call and defend it
  
  

You don't need to tick every single box to apply. We care more about capability, perspective, and how you think than about counting years or buzzwords. If you've done most of this and you're hungry for the rest, we want to hear from you.
  
  

Apply without CV or cover letter!
  
  

If this sounds exciting and you're eager to apply - go ahead and do it ASAP! It’s quick and easy. No CV or cover letter needed, instead, we ask you to answer a few questions that are valuable for us in our selection process. Please apply as soon as possible, but no later than 16th of june.
  
  

Do you have questions about the position? Contact Seve Michel, Head of Online at seve.michel@lyko.com. We look forward to receiving your application!
  
  

Work with great people
  
Rebecka Landh
  
Purchaser K-beauty & Trends
  
"The best part of working at Lyko is combining a passion for beauty with a fast-paced environment, real responsibility, and amazing colleagues. Within K-beauty, something new is always happening, and working with trends and brands to create the best experience for our customers is both challenging and incredibly rewarding. Lyko encourages courage, innovation, and personal drive – giving you the opportunity to truly make an impact and grow!"
  
Erika Weilander
  
System Developer
  
"The best thing about Lyko is the combination of amazing colleagues, creative freedom, and a high level of responsibility. Here, I get to be creative, test ideas, and truly make an impact in my work—while being surrounded by a team that always supports and inspires me, making every day both enjoyable and enriching!"
  
Daniel Ramzi
  
IT Helpdesk
  
"Lyko is a workplace where you can have fun while being part of something that is constantly moving forward. I’m inspired every day by colleagues with incredible drive—from the warehouse in Vansbro and our stores to our offices across Europe. If you enjoy developing, taking responsibility, and working with people who want to move forward together, Lyko is the perfect place for you"
  
Aura Vuorela
  
Event & PR Manager Finland
  
"What I first fell in love with at Lyko, was the fun and bit of a rebel attitude sprinkled all around the company and culture. You're always encouraged to try new things, think outside the box and be creative, with no judgment, and that really is the foundation for creating magical things, and of course bringing the best out of the amazing Lyko people."
  
  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
  
  

Countires
  
We exist in eight countries — Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland, Germany, the Netherlands, Austria, and Poland. Which will be our ninth one?
  
  

Packages
  
Every 100th package sent in Sweden last year was from Lyko. Cool, right!?
  
  

Sustainability
  
Yes, we work with beauty, but we till believe that we can make a difference for the environment. That's why all our shipping is fossil free, and our packaging is kept to a minimum.
  
  

Delivery
  
When a customer places an order with us, it is packed and sent out for delivery within 18 minutes-ish. We’re proud of that – but also committed to improving it!
  
  

Family
  
Lyko is a family business, with the name of the company being the same as the family name. The entire family still works within the company.

title: Paid Search Manager
description:
Since 2003, Lyko has grown from a small e-shop into a full-fledged beauty ecosystem, and we're continuing to build the best digital beauty experience in the Nordics and beyond. With over 87,000 products from 1,000+ brands, we're on a mission to elevate our digital experience - and Paid Search is at the very heart of it.
  
  

How central? Very, Paid Search drives a significant share of our online revenue. That's not a channel you optimize on the side. That's a channel someone owns. We're looking for that someone.
  
  

About the role
  
As Paid Search Manager, you own the direction and performance of Paid Search across our markets. But this isn't a role about living inside Google Ads and tweaking bids. We're looking for someone who works outside the platform just as much as inside it, someone comfortable in BigQuery, with Google Ads Scripts and API integrations, who designs how data flows between our advertising platforms and our cloud environment so that attribution, reporting, and automation actually hold up.
  
  

In practice, that means you set the strategy, own the budget allocation across markets and categories, and build the technical and measurement frameworks that let Paid Search scale. You'll navigate the constant trade-off between buying market share and protecting the bottom line, and you'll do it with system-level thinking, understanding how Paid Search connects to inventory, margins, and the rest of our channel mix rather than looking at CoS/POAS in a silo.
  
  

**Your main responsibilities include:**  

Setting and evolving Lyko's Paid Search direction and performance across markets
  
Owning budget allocation and prioritization across markets, campaigns, and categories actively managing the balance between growth and profitability
  
**Designing and governing the end-to-end technical framework:** data flow architecture, cloud integrations GCP/BigQuery, and platform configuration.
  
Building a clear KPI framework, integrated with Lyko's overall goals, across funnel stages and campaign types
  
Developing forecasting and predictive models — for example estimating customer value and projecting outcomes ahead of major campaigns (NCA, Big 5)
  
Setting up and running a structured testing framework as part of your everyday work
  
Establishing a tier framework that sets the right strategy and standard for different markets
  
Navigating tracking in a privacy-first, cookieless world (Consent Mode, server-side tagging, Google Tag Gateway) - including projects like sending app conversion data back into Google Ads
  
Communicating performance and insight across the organization, including ongoing follow-up on our largest campaigns
  
  

Who you are
  
You've earned your seniority by doing the work. You know your way around BigQuery and a tag manager, and you can tell when an attribution problem is actually a data problem. But you also know the channel never lives in isolation. Every real decision touches margin, inventory, brand, or what another channel just did — and you hold all of it at once without losing the thread.
  
  

That matters here, because this role sits where Paid Search gets genuinely hard. Several markets, a channel that moves the business, and a tracking setup that's being rebuilt as we speak — you need to be at home in that kind of complexity, not just tolerant of it.
  
You're used to building structure and navigating in an ever-changing environment where self-leadership is at the heart of everything you do.
  
  

**In other words you have skills in:**  

Senior-level Paid Search / SEM strategy and portfolio-level performance management
  
Solid technical and analytical skills — automation, scripting, platform integrations, bidding logic. Hands-on knowledge of BigQuery, Google Ads
  
Scripts, and API integrations is a strong plus
  
Forecasting, estimation, and predictive thinking applied to channel performance
  
**Privacy-first tracking:** server-side tagging, Consent Mode and similar
  
You navigate the growth-vs-profitability trade-off independently — and you can explain to leadership why you made the call you made
  
**You're self-led:** you don't wait for someone to set your priorities, you make a call and defend it
  
Comfortable arguing your position with analysts, leadership, and other channel owners — and equally comfortable changing your mind when someone makes a better point
  
  

You don't need to tick every single box to apply. We care more about capability, perspective, and how you think than about counting years or buzzwords. If you've done most of this and you're hungry for the rest, we want to hear from you.
  
  

About the setup
  
This is a permanent, full-time position based at our headquarters on Sveavägen, Stockholm. You'll report to Seve Michel, Head of Online, and sit at the intersection of media, data, and tech, working closely with several specialist teams across the business.
  
  

We believe great, inclusive cultures are built by people actually meeting and working together - so we've landed on what we call "Business First": at least three days a week at the office, the other two up to you, as long as it works with the needs of the business. A pretty good balance, if you ask us.
  
  

Apply without CV or cover letter
  
  

If this sounds exciting and you're eager to apply - go ahead and do it ASAP! It’s quick and easy. No CV or cover letter needed, instead, we ask you to answer a few questions that are valuable for us in our selection process. Please apply as soon as possible, but no later than 16th of june 2026.
  
  

Do you have questions about the position? Contact Seve Michel, Head of Online at seve.michel@lyko.com. We look forward to receiving your application!
  
  

Work with great people
  
Rebecka Landh
  
Purchaser K-beauty & Trends
  
"The best part of working at Lyko is combining a passion for beauty with a fast-paced environment, real responsibility, and amazing colleagues. Within K-beauty, something new is always happening, and working with trends and brands to create the best experience for our customers is both challenging and incredibly rewarding. Lyko encourages courage, innovation, and personal drive – giving you the opportunity to truly make an impact and grow!"
  
Erika Weilander

"The best thing about Lyko is the combination of amazing colleagues, creative freedom, and a high level of responsibility. Here, I get to be creative, test ideas, and truly make an impact in my work—while being surrounded by a team that always supports and inspires me, making every day both enjoyable and enriching!"
