title: Account Executive
description:
**We’ve signed up to an ambitious journey. Join us!**
 As Arrive, we guide customers and communities towards brighter futures and more livable cities, it isn’t a challenge just anyone could take on. Luckily, we have something to help us make it happen. Our people and our values. We Arrive Curious, Focused and Together. Just as our entire brand is inspired by the North Star, the shining light leading travelers to their destinations since time began, our values guide us. They help us be at our best. For our customers. For the cities and communities we serve. For ourselves. As a global team, we are transforming urban mobility. Let’s grow better, together.
   

  

**The Role**
 It is an exciting time to join our B2B Sales team in Stockholm as an Account Executive. In this role, you will be on the front line of the company's growth, responsible for expanding an existing customer portfolio and introducing our business solutions to new prospects. Operating within an inside sales environment, you will lead the end-to-end process of selling, negotiating, and quoting our Corporate SaaS solutions. You will have a direct impact on our commercial success while benefiting from a clear career development plan and structured training programs.
   

  

**How To Make An Impact**
* Actively sell, negotiate, and quote EasyPark B2B solutions while providing comprehensive account support.
* Establish and nurture relationships with customers and new prospects to drive sales and increase brand awareness for our business solutions.
* Execute an effective sales targeting approach to consistently meet and exceed all sales and activity KPIs.
* Maintain high data quality and accuracy within the CRM system to ensure seamless operations.
* Take full commercial responsibility for customer deals, ensuring the delivery of qualitative sales and long-term value.


**About You**
 You are a solution-oriented professional with a proactive mindset and a passion for growth. You thrive in environments that require active listening and the ability to adapt quickly to different personalities and situations. With excellent time-management skills, you know how to prioritize effectively in a fast-paced setting. You are positive, self-motivated, and eager to contribute both socially and professionally to a strong, collaborative team culture. You value being coachable and are committed to constantly developing your skills as an expert in the sales field.
   

  

**Your background**
* 3+ years of sales experience within a B2B environment.
* Proven determination to strive for and exceed ambitious goals and targets.
* Strong communication skills with a genuine enjoyment for interacting with people and building rapport.
* An innovative thinker who is self-motivated and comfortable working both independently and as a collaborative team player.
* Fluency in both Swedish and English is required for this role.


**This role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.**
 Arrive, including brands like EasyPark, Flowbird, RingGo, ParkMobile and Parkopedia, is a leading global mobility platform. Present in over 90 countries and 20,000 cities, the company helps people and decision-makers make smarter decisions about urban mobility and ease the experience of travel worldwide. Arrive delivers a unique combination of the core ingredients to make cities more livable: from smart payments and optimized car parks to data-driven traffic reduction and support for reinvestment in public transport and green space. It’s about more than function, it’s about saving time and simplifying the experience of travel for everyone. Travel is more than a journey, it’s how you Arrive.

title: Growth Analytics Lead
description:
*Natural Cycles° is a leading women’s health company that developed the world’s first birth control app, used by millions globally. We are a fast growing startup, and we promote an international working environment filled with smart and ambitious colleagues based in Stockholm, Geneva, New York, and remotely. Our mission is to pioneer women’s health through research and passion, empowering every woman with the knowledge she needs to take charge of her health.* 




  





 We’re looking for a
 **Growth Analytics Lead** 
 to help us scale user growth and revenue growth across our international markets. In this role, you will own and evolve how we measure, understand and optimize performance across the entire growth funnel – from acquisition and activation to retention and monetization.
 



 Sitting at the intersection of growth, marketing, product and data, you will play a key role in shaping our growth strategy by turning complex data into actionable insights. Your work will directly impact how we invest across paid, owned and organic channels, ensuring we drive efficient and scalable growth with a strong focus on CAC, LTV and unit economics.
 



  





**Please note that this role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.** 




  





**What you will be doing:** 



* Owning and developing Natural Cycles’ growth analytics framework across all markets, covering the full funnel from acquisition and activation to retention and revenue.
* Definining, monitoring and analyzing key performance metrics such as CAC, LTV, payback periods and overall unit economics across paid, owned and organic channels.
* Leading attribution and incrementality efforts, including designing experiments and evaluating channel effectiveness to guide investment decisions.
* Partnering closely with growth, marketing and product teams to identify opportunities, inform strategy and prioritize high-impact initiatives.
* Building and maintaining scalable dashboards, reporting and analytical models using tools such as Snowflake, Mixpanel and Tableau to provide visibility into performance and key growth drivers.
* Analyzing user behavior across app and web to uncover insights that improve conversion, engagement and retention.
* Acting as a strategic thought partner to leadership, translating complex analyses into clear, actionable recommendations that drive business impact.
* This role requires a highly hands-on operator who can work end-to-end – from deep-dive analysis to shaping strategy and influencing decision-making across the organization.



  





**What skills and experience we think you have** 



* 5+ years of experience in growth analytics, marketing analytics or a similar role in a subscription, app or digital product environment.
* Strong experience analyzing performance across the full funnel, with a deep understanding of acquisition, activation, retention and monetization dynamics.
* Proven expertise in attribution modeling and incrementality testing (e.g. geo experiments, lift studies, MMM or similar approaches).
* Strong understanding of key growth metrics such as CAC, LTV, payback periods and overall unit economics, and how to use them to guide decision-making.
* Advanced analytical skills with strong SQL proficiency and experience working with large-scale datasets in cloud data warehouse environments such as Snowflake, BigQuery or similar technologies.
* Experience working with product analytics and BI tools such as Mixpanel, Tableau, Looker, Amplitude or similar platforms.
* Experience working with product and marketing data across mobile apps and web environments.
* Experience working with mobile apps and/or subscription-based business models is a plus.
* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to translate complex analyses into clear, actionable insights.
* Ability to communicate effectively and collaborate with both technical and non-technical stakeholders



  





**What we offer** 



* Flexible work arrangement - you will be part of a team based in and around Stockholm that values effective collaboration and transparent communication, irrespective of work location
* Professional development - you will work alongside knowledgeable colleagues in the continuous growth and skill enhancement environment
* Modern technology - you will leverage innovative technologies and tools, within an environment that empowers you to contribute ideas and take ownership of your work
* Impactful projects - you will contribute to groundbreaking projects that redefine industry standards and create tangible value
* Commitment to quality - you will join a dynamic and progressive organization that prioritizes profitable, long-term product development



  





**Location** 




 We are remote-friendly, but we find great value in being able to connect with our teams in person. Most of the international marketing team you will work with is located in Stockholm, and the team occasionally meets in the office for collaboration and face-to-face time.
 



  





**Sounds interesting?** 




 If you want to be part of a successful team, we encourage you to apply for this position as soon as possible. We look forward to hearing from you!
 



  





**How to apply** 




 To apply, just upload your CV and answer the questions on the application form. Keep in mind that we can't accept applications through email because of GDPR, and only applications submitted via the career site (and in English) will be considered.
 



  





 At Natural Cycles we value diversity and inclusion because we know that teams with people from different backgrounds and experiences are stronger. We welcome candidates from all walks of life and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and candidates.
 



  





  





**Note: We are not looking for consultants or help from recruitment agencies**

title: Financial Controller till SaaS-bolag i Stockholm
description:
*Vill du kombinera redovisning, analys och förbättringsarbete i en internationell techmiljö där förändring, innovation och samarbete står högt på agendan? Trivs du i en roll där du får ta stort eget ansvar, arbeta nära verksamheten och samtidigt vara med och utveckla moderna finance-processer? Då kan detta vara nästa steg för dig.*
*Vi söker nu en Financial Controller till ett internationellt SaaS-bolag med huvudkontor i Solna. Bolaget levererar affärskritiska lösningar till kunder i över 30 länder och befinner sig i en spännande fas med starkt fokus på transformation, effektivisering och fortsatt tillväxt.*
*Här blir du en del av en modern och internationell organisation där finance ses som en viktig affärspartner och där du får möjlighet att påverka både arbetssätt och processer framåt.*
*Detta är en rekrytering direkt till vår kund.*
****Om rollen****
 I rollen som Financial Controller arbetar du brett inom redovisning och controlling med ansvar för flera legala enheter. Du blir en viktig del av finance-teamet och arbetar nära både Business Controllers, verksamheten och internationella kontaktytor.
   

  

 Rollen kombinerar operativt redovisningsarbete med analys, förbättringsinitiativ och utveckling av processer. Du rapporterar till Head of Finance och blir en del av ett engagerat team med hög kompetens och stark laganda.
   

  

 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Ansvara för löpande redovisning och bokslut för bolag inom koncernen
* Hantera månads-, kvartals- och årsbokslut
* Kontoavstämningar samt balans- och resultatanalyser
* Momsrapportering och kontakt med myndigheter och revisorer
* Årsredovisningar för svenska bolag
* Arbeta med analyser, uppföljningar och förbättringsinitiativ inom finance
* Vara kontaktperson mot Business Controllers och andra interna stakeholders
* Bidra till utveckling och effektivisering av processer och rutiner


****Vem är du?****
 Vi tror att du är en person som gillar kombinationen av redovisning, analys och förbättringsarbete. Du trivs i en föränderlig miljö där man arbetar nära verksamheten och där det finns stort utrymme att påverka. Du är nyfiken, prestigelös och har ett genuint intresse för redovisning och moderna digitala processer. Samtidigt uppskattar du att arbeta i team och bidra till en positiv och inkluderande kultur.
   

  

 Vi ser gärna att du har:
   

  

* Minst 3 års erfarenhet inom redovisning och/eller finance
* Akademisk examen inom ekonomi, redovisning eller finans
* Erfarenhet av bokslutsarbete och kvalificerad redovisning
* God förståelse för redovisningsprinciper och regelverk, gärna IFRS
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Excel
* Erfarenhet av ERP-system, gärna Business Central
* Erfarenhet av Power BI är meriterande
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


 Bakgrund från revision, internationell miljö eller bolag i förändring ses som positivt, men viktigast är din inställning, drivkraft och vilja att utvecklas.
   

  

****Varför den här rollen?****
 Det här är en möjlighet för dig som vill in i en modern SaaS-miljö där finance är nära affären och där utveckling står i fokus. Du får arbeta i en internationell organisation med stark entreprenöriell anda, korta beslutsvägar och ett högt förändringstempo – samtidigt som kulturen präglas av samarbete, omtanke och prestigelöshet.
   

  

 Bolaget erbjuder:
   

  

* En internationell och innovativ techmiljö
* Stora möjligheter att påverka och utveckla arbetssätt
* Kompetenta och engagerade kollegor
* Moderna kontorslokaler
* Hybridarbete med tydligt fokus på samarbete och teamkänsla


****Vill du bli en del av teamet?****
 Vid frågor kontakta ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Elin Lindén på telefon 0721-74 66 75 eller via elin.linden@sevrrecruitment.se eller Helena Ambrén på telefon 0761-71 53 00 eller via helena.ambren@sevr.se. Då vi arbetar löpande urval kan tjänsten komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Vi rekommenderar dig därför att söka så snart som möjligt.
   

  

 Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail, välkommen med din ansökan via länk.

title: Information Technology Procurement Manager
company: Embedded Skills | Rekrytering och bemanning inom Inköp & Supply Chain
description:
**Konsultuppdrag: Interim Commercial Manager – IT Procurement** 




**Hej!** 




 Till en av våra kunder söker vi nu en erfaren chef/ledare med bakgrund inom IT/tech-inköp för ett interimsuppdrag som Commercial Manager med placering i Stockholm.
 



  





 Detta är en nyckelroll för dig som har en stark bakgrund inom IT-inköp och leverantörsstyrning samtidigt som du är en trygg och erfaren ledare.
 



 =>
 **Uppdragets start** 
 : ASAP, men senast i juni.
 



 =>
 **Uppdragslängd** 
 : Ca 6 månader ev. möjlighet till förlängning.
 



 =>
 **Plats** 
 : Stockholm onsite
 



 =>
 **Sista ansökningsdag** 
 : Snarast. Urval och intervjuer sker omgående, dock senast 7 juni.
 



 =>
 **Anställningsform** 
 : Konsultuppdrag via Embedded Skills (se mer nedan)
 



  





**Please note: To be considered as a candidate you need to be a Swedish resident with a working permit.** 




  





 Detta är en nyckelroll för dig som har en stark bakgrund inom IT-inköp och leverantörsstyrning samtidigt som du är en trygg och erfaren ledare. Du kommer att ansvara för ett internationellt team och bidra både strategiskt och operativt i arbetet med att utveckla kundens kommersiella förmåga inom teknologiområdet.
 



  





**Om uppdraget** 




  





 Som Commercial Manager kommer du att:
 


* Leda, coacha och utveckla ett internationellt team av kommersiella specialister (14 personer i Sverige och Indien)
* Skapa struktur, tydlighet och framdrift i en verksamhet med högt tempo och många intressenter
* Driva strategiskt sourcingarbete, leverantörsval och kommersiella förhandlingar inom IT och teknologi
* Säkerställa affärsmässiga avtal, god leverantörsstyrning och långsiktigt värdeskapande
* Arbeta nära verksamhet, teknikorganisation och andra nyckelintressenter
* Följa upp leverantörers prestation och vid behov själv bidra operativt i affärskritiska frågor
* Bidra till utveckling av processer, arbetssätt och kommersiella styrmodeller



  





**Vi söker dig som har** 



* Erfarenhet av IT-inköp, Technology Procurement, Strategic Sourcing eller Vendor Management
* Erfarenhet av att leda och utveckla team
* Erfarenhet av komplexa IT-avtal, SaaS-lösningar och leverantörsrelationer inom teknikområdet
* Du har sannolikt arbetat med strategiskt sourcingarbete, leverantörsförhandlingar eller kommersiell leverantörsstyrning inom IT samtidigt som du haft ansvar för att leda, coacha och utveckla medarbetare.



  





 Vi tror att du trivs i skärningspunkten mellan ledarskap och operativt arbete och känner dig bekväm med att växla mellan strategiska diskussioner, kommersiella förhandlingar och daglig verksamhetsstyrning.
 



  





**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet från större internationella organisationer
* Erfarenhet av Software Asset Management (SAM)
* Erfarenhet av komplexa leverantörsstrukturer och multivendor-miljöer
* Erfarenhet av förändringsledning och organisationsutveckling
* Akademisk utbildning inom ekonomi, teknik, inköp eller motsvarande



  





**Om uppdraget** 




 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag via Embedded Skills och du kan antingen vara anställd av oss under uppdragstiden eller fakturera från eget bolag.
 



  





**Om att vara konsult hos Embedded Skills** 




 När du jobbar med oss på Embedded Skills går det bra att antingen vara anställd hos oss under uppdraget eller att fakturera från eget AB. Som anställd hos oss har du flera förmåner, t ex sjukvårdsförsäkring och friskvårdsbidrag. Självklart får du pension enligt ITP1-modell från dag 1.
 



  





*Tips! Var gärna noga med att det klart framgår i ditt CV hur du uppfyller de krav som kunden efterfrågar.* 




  





 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan på
 **engelska** 
 !
 



  





 För frågor går det bra att kontakta Rebecca Ancker, 0734-332336

title: Lead Enterprise Architect for Finance Architecture
description:
**Job ID: 4791**
 Welcome to Group Technology, where we engineer solutions and drive Nordea’s transformation by providing a holistic technology view and a structured understanding of the bank and its surrounding environment. We enable the Customer Vision and Business Strategy through strong architecture leadership and close collaboration across business and technology.
   

  

 We are looking for a Lead Enterprise Architect for Finance Architecture to lead architecture across key Finance and Function domains within Nordea. This is a full-time permanent position with shared leadership accountability within our Service Area setup. Finance data sits at the core of several enterprise-wide transformations, and this role plays a central part in shaping how Finance capabilities evolve across the Group.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 Meet the Finance Architecture team. Our role is to define clear architecture direction for Finance domains and ensure solutions are aligned with Nordea’s business strategy, regulatory obligations, and long-term transformation agenda. We work closely with business and technology leaders in a shared Service Area leadership model to enable sustainable and effective change.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
**Main responsibilities in this role:**
* Lead the Finance Architecture portfolio through strong leadership and alignment, creating clarity, accountability and predictability while delivering against business objectives.
* Owning and developing architecture strategies, target and transition architectures for Finance domains
* Acting as architectural lead and sparring partner to senior business, technology, and leadership stakeholders
* Ensuring architecture governance and compliance with Nordea standards, regulatory requirements, and risk appetite
* Building and nurturing a strong community of solution architects and senior technologists, fostering collaboration and architectural excellence


**Who You Are**
 This is the right role for you if you are a senior architecture leader who combines strategic thinking with strong execution capability. You are comfortable operating at all levels of the organisation and communicate complex architecture topics in a clear, structured, and engaging way. You build trust, create transparency, and balance long-term architectural vision with short-term delivery needs in a complex, regulated environment.
   

  

**Your background and skills include:**
* Strong stakeholder management experience, including communicating and getting buy-in from senior stakeholders.
* Several years of experience working with architecture disciplines, supported by a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in computer science, engineering or similar.
* Extensive experience in enterprise architecture and solution governance, preferably within banking, finance, or other regulated organisations
* Strong understanding of Finance domains, including data, reporting, analytics, and regulatory considerations
* Experience defining and governing target and transition architectures from EA level down to solution level


**It would be ideal if you also:**
* Have experience with data platforms, analytics, or AI-driven solutions
* Bring a background as a data architect, or deep experience working in data-intensive Finance domains
* Have worked with modern integration patterns, APIs, or large-scale platforms


**What We Offer**
 People come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

 A culture that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

 Hybrid working model – we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

 Diversity and inclusion are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 12/06/2026.
   

  

 For more information, you’re welcome to contact Philip Peter Wilhelm Lenter at philip.lenter@nordea.com
   

  

 We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.
   

  

 We build relationships. We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

 We learn and develop. We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

 We lead change. We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

 We are Nordea. We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Finland:** 
 A security clearance will be performed for the person selected for this position.

title: Senior .NET / Blazor Developer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* Extensive experience with .NET and C#
* Strong hands-on experience with Blazor
* Experience working with complex business-critical applications
* Experience throughout the software development lifecycle
* Understanding of application architecture and solution design
* Strong collaboration and communication skills
* Fluent Swedish and English, both written and spoken
* Interest in AI-assisted development tools such as GitHub Copilot


**Meritorious**
* Angular
* Application migration and modernization projects
* Engineering or technical academic background
* Industrial or manufacturing experience
* IT architecture
* Scrum and/or Kanban
* Jira, Reqtest, RTM or similar tools
* Automated testing
* CI/CD
* SonarQube or similar code quality tools


**Application deadline:** 
 09-06-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Sales Manager HPE Networking
description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Family Definition:**
 Leads the sales team to drive growth and profitability. Builds a high-performing team, manages sales execution and forecasting, and strengthens customer and partner relationships. Supports complex deals and drives pipeline growth aligned with HPE strategy.
   

  

**Management Level Definition**
 Manages a sales team and is accountable for results (revenue, people, operations). Provides guidance, drives execution, and supports team development. Typically reports to Director level.
   

  

**Additional Guidance/criteria**
* Manages and controls activities within a single country (Sweden)
* Manages a team of ~8–15 people


**Responsibilities**
**Managing the Business:**
* Sales coverage – Build targeted business plans and allocate resources to drive sales and margins; collaborate across teams to prioritize and direct activities.
* Account planning – Support sales strategy and processes; align account plans with corporate strategy; manage geography plans to meet revenue targets; ensure accurate forecasting, progress tracking, and regular reviews.
* Pipeline management – Build, track, and manage a healthy pipeline (short and long term); monitor size, quality, and win/loss performance.
* Deal management – Review deals to ensure quality and smooth execution; track deal progress and governance.
* Business acumen – Apply business, financial, and legal understanding to improve performance and align operations with company direction.
* Strategic sales planning & implementation – Develop and execute sales strategies to grow market share and drive profitable growth.
* Competitive positioning – Use market insights to strengthen positioning and counter competitors in customer engagements.


**Leading & Managing Sales People**
* Coaching & performance management – Manage and develop team performance; support individuals through challenges and drive results across all performers.
* Leadership – Lead by example; motivate and support teams in winning and closing deals.
* People development – Drive skill development to increase team productivity and impact.
* Change management – Lead the team effectively through change and transformation.
* Attract and hire top talent to the team


**Selling As a Sales Manager**
* Strategic direction – Align team activities with company strategy and support solution positioning based on customer needs.
* C-level engagement – Build strong relationships with senior customer stakeholders and decision-makers.
* Consultative selling – Coach teams on identifying and advancing opportunities; support client engagements and ensure access to the right resources.
* Industry & client knowledge – Stay up to date on market trends and customer challenges; position solutions aligned to business needs.


**Your Profile**
**Education and Experience Required:**
* Proven sales leadership experience with strong results
* Project management skills
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent
* 7+ years experience in IT sales
* Fluency in both English and Swedish are required


**Knowledge And Skills**
* Business Management: Proven ability to execute sales strategy and manage pipeline, forecasting, and overall performance
* Sales Development: Demonstrated experience in mobilizing resources, driving sales execution, growing key accounts, and hiring top talent
* Workforce Management & Development: Strong people management skills, including performance management, coaching, and team development
* Customer Engagement: Proven ability to build strong customer relationships and drive high levels of customer satisfaction
* Strategic Business Planning: Experience managing revenue and margins, with a focus on identifying and driving strategic growth opportunities
* Sales Team / Individual Coaching: Strong coaching and mentoring capabilities; ability to support deals, align team priorities, and drive results


**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Assertiveness, Bias, Building Rapport, Buyer Personas, Coaching, Complex Sales, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Experience Strategy, Customer Interactions, Design Thinking, Empathy, Financial Acumen, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Identifying Sales Opportunities, Industry Knowledge, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity {+ 6 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal & Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 #sweden
   

  

 #networking
   

  

**Job**
 Sales
   

  

**Job Level**
 Manager\_1
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**Recruitment Fraud Alert**
 We have become aware of an increase in fraudulent recruitment activities in which individuals impersonate our company or authorized recruitment agencies to offer fake employment opportunities. These scams may occur through false websites, emails, social media, or chat-based applications and often aim to obtain personal information or money. Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors will never charge a candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process. We also never request personal information such as back account details, Social Security numbers, or national IDs via social media or chat applications.
   

  

 All legitimate job opportunities will come through official company channels, and candidates are responsible for verifying the credentials of any third party claiming to represent the company. Any reliance on fraudulent communication is at the individual’s own risk, and HPE disclaims legal liability for any resulting damages. If you suspect recruitment fraud, do not share personal information or make any payments and report the incident to your local authorities immediately.

title: Produktionsledare
description:
**Produktionsledare** 




  





**Är du den vi söker?** 




 Vill du ha en central roll där du får koordinera marknadsproduktioner, driva projekt framåt och säkerställa att kampanjer levereras med hög kvalitet, i tid och enligt budget? Trivs du i en miljö med många kontaktytor där du samarbetar med både interna team och externa byråer? Då kan detta vara uppdraget för dig.
 



  





 Vi söker en erfaren Produktionsledare med bakgrund från spelbranschen, lotteri, underhållning eller en närliggande konsumentorienterad verksamhet som vill bidra till att utveckla och optimera marknads- och kommunikationsproduktioner för ett välkänt varumärke. Här får du en nyckelroll i en dynamisk organisation där samarbete, kvalitet och affärsmässighet står i fokus.
 



 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag på sju månader med planerad start efter sommaren. Då kunden önskar komma vidare i processen inom kort arbetar vi med löpande urval och intervjuer. Vi rekommenderar därför att du skickar in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.
 



  





**Arbetsbeskrivning** 




 Som Produktionsledare ansvarar du för att koordinera och optimera materialflöden, kommunikationsaktiviteter och produktioner. Du säkerställer att kampanjer, marknadsmaterial och andra kommunikationsinsatser produceras och publiceras enligt plan, inom budget och med högsta möjliga kvalitet.
 



  





 I rollen arbetar du nära Brand Managers, interna specialistfunktioner och externa byråer för att säkerställa att allt material följer varumärkets riktlinjer, kommunikationsplattformar och gällande regelverk. Du har en nyckelroll i att skapa effektiva processer, koordinera många parallella aktiviteter och säkerställa ett smidigt samarbete mellan alla involverade parter.
 



 Du blir en viktig del av marknadsteamet där du både driver egna initiativ och bidrar till att utveckla arbetssätt och processer för framtida framgång.
 



  





 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:
 



 • Planera, koordinera och följa upp marknads- och kommunikationsproduktioner
 



 • Säkerställa att kampanjmaterial produceras och publiceras enligt tidsplan, budget och kvalitetskrav
 



 • Koordinera samarbetet mellan Brand Managers, interna team och externa byråer
 



 • Hantera och optimera interna och externa informations- och materialflöden
 



 • Beställa, följa upp och kvalitetssäkra produktionstjänster från externa leverantörer och byråer
 



 • Arbeta med anpassning av material för olika målgrupper, kanaler och interna funktioner
 



 • Delta i och driva projekt samt kampanjkoordinerande forum
 



 • Identifiera och implementera förbättringar i produktions- och arbetsprocesser
 



 • Säkerställa att marknadsföring och kommunikation följer lagar, riktlinjer och varumärkets styrande principer
 



 • Utvärdera kampanjmaterial och processer tillsammans med interna och externa intressenter
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som är en erfaren Produktionsledare med ett starkt driv och en naturlig förmåga att skapa struktur i komplexa projekt. Du är van att koordinera många intressenter samtidigt och har en god förståelse för hela produktionskedjan inom marknadsföring och kommunikation.
 



 Vi söker dig som är strukturerad, proaktiv och van att driva flera parallella projekt samtidigt. Du har en god förmåga att skapa ordning i komplexa processer och säkerställer att leveranser håller hög kvalitet, även när tempot är högt. Med ett lösningsorienterat arbetssätt tar du initiativ, ser möjligheter till förbättring och driver arbetet framåt.
 



 Du är noggrann och detaljorienterad samtidigt som du behåller ett tydligt helhetsperspektiv. Vidare är du kommunikativ, prestigelös och trivs i en roll med många kontaktytor där samarbete är en naturlig del av vardagen. Du arbetar lika effektivt självständigt som tillsammans med andra och har lätt för att skapa goda relationer med såväl kollegor som externa samarbetspartners.
 



  





**Till oss tar du med dig:** 




 • Eftergymnasial utbildning inom marknadsföring, kommunikation eller produktionsledning
 



 • Minst 3 års erfarenhet av liknande arbetsuppgifter på en marknadsavdelning
 



 • Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att arbeta som Produktionsledare inom kommunikation och marknadsföring
 



 • Erfarenhet av att beställa och koordinera produktionstjänster från externa byråer och leverantörer
 



 • Minst 3 års erfarenhet av samarbete med kreativa byråer
 



 • Mycket god kunskap inom produktion av reklam- och marknadsmaterial
 



 • Erfarenhet av att koordinera och optimera processer med många involverade parter
 



 • God förståelse för marknadsföring och kommunikation i flera kanaler
 



 • Erfarenhet av Adobe Creative Cloud, Photoshop och webbaserade bannerproduktionsplattformar, exempelvis Bannerflow
 



 • Goda kunskaper i Office-paketet och SharePoint • Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift
 



 • Vi ser gärna att du har erfarenhet från spelbranschen eller en närliggande bransch, exempelvis gaming, underhållning, telekom, retail eller annan konsumentnära verksamhet
 



  





**Konsult på Inhouse** 




 Som konsult på Inhouse kommer du att känna av att vi lever våra värdeord - samverkan, personliga & utmanande! Du erbjuds självklart en marknadsmässig lön, friskvårdsbidrag, pensionsavsättning och anslutning till vårt kollektivavtal. Vi älskar att träffa våra konsulter och ser till att ha roligt tillsammans. Vi bjuder regelbundet in till t ex lunch, konsultträffar och andra aktiviteter. Ett nära samarbete är viktigt för oss och våra konsultchefer är både närvarande och kunniga.
 



 Hos oss kan du välja om du vill vara anställd eller fakturera via eget bolag. Oavsett vilket kan du kan ställa höga krav på oss som arbets- och uppdragsgivare. Inget är viktigare för oss än att du känner dig trygg och att du ska trivas i din anställning och ute på dina uppdrag. Vi värnar om din utveckling och hoppas kunna bidra med spännande uppdrag i många olika typer av organisationer.
 



  





 Inhouse är ett konsultföretag inom organisationsutveckling, rekrytering och konsultlösningar. Våra affärsområden är HR, ekonomi & finans, marknad & kommunikation, IT&Tech, Inköp & Supply chain och Talents by Inhouse. Det är viktigt för oss att vara värdefulla rådgivare till våra uppdragsgivare, därför har alla som arbetar på Inhouse varit verksamma inom sina områden.
 



  





**Ansök enkelt med ditt CV och din LinkedIn-profil** 




 På Inhouse rekryterar vi kompetensbaserat för en mer rättvis process. Vi önskar därför inte ett personligt brev och du kan inte heller söka via mail eller andra externa kanaler. Du ansöker enkelt med ditt CV eller LinkedInprofil.
 



 För mer information eller frågor, kontakta Thérèse på therese.norling@inhouse.se.
 



 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
 



  





***Värt att veta!***




 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag där du blir anställd av Inhouse (alternativt fakturerar via eget bolag) och arbetar ute hos vår kund. Uppdraget är på heltid och sträcker sig över sju månader med planerad start efter sommaren.

title: Kommunikations- och partneransvarig
description:
Berättarministeriet söker en Kommunikations- och partnerskapsansvarig som vill leda arbetet med organisationens externa position, strategiska kommunikation och långsiktiga partnerskap.
 



  





 Rollen är en central del av GS-staben och kombinerar kommunikation, samhällspåverkan, relationsbyggande och extern finansiering. Du ansvarar för att utveckla Berättarministeriets synlighet, stärka våra samarbeten med företag, stiftelser och andra samhällsaktörer samt säkerställa en tydlig och sammanhållen kommunikation med utgångspunkt i vår verksamhet.
 



  





 Framgång i rollen handlar om att stärka Berättarministeriets position, skapa större genomslag för våra frågor, utveckla långsiktiga partnerskap och bidra till en stabil grund för organisationens fortsatta utveckling.
   




 Ansvar
 * Leda och vidareutveckla Berättarministeriets strategiska kommunikation och externa positionering
* Äga och utveckla organisationens budskapsplattform och kommunikativa inriktning
* Utforma och genomföra kommunikationsplaner med tydliga mål och prioriteringar
* Driva PR-arbete, mediekontakter, debattartiklar och andra kommunikativa initiativ
* Utveckla och förvalta strategiska partnerskap med företag, stiftelser och andra samhällsaktörer
* Identifiera nya möjligheter till samarbete och extern finansiering
* Ta fram presentationsmaterial, underlag och argumentation för externa målgrupper
* Fungera som strategiskt stöd till generalsekreteraren i frågor som rör samhällsdebatt, policy och extern positionering
* Leda, utveckla och stötta kommunikationsteamet
* Ansvara för funktionens budget, prioriteringar och måluppföljning


 Kvalifikationer
 * Flera års erfarenhet av strategisk kommunikation, PR, Public Affairs eller samhällspositionering
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att utveckla och genomföra kommunikationsstrategier
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska
* Erfarenhet av att bygga och utveckla långsiktiga partnerskap och relationer
* God förståelse för medielogik, opinionsbildning och samhällsfrågor
* Erfarenhet av att leda medarbetare eller mindre team
* Förmåga att arbeta både strategiskt och operativt
* Relevant akademisk utbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet



  





**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet från idéburen sektor, stiftelse eller annan samhällsnyttig verksamhet
* Kunskap om utbildningsfrågor eller skolväsendet
* Erfarenhet av extern finansiering, partnerskap eller insamlingsarbete
* Erfarenhet av arbete nära ledningsgrupp eller styrelse

title: [ITO] (GSD) Workday Specialist - Payroll Module (Bangkok/Indian/Malaysia-based, relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**Get to Know our Team:**
 The Global Service Delivery (GSD) team is responsible for Agoda's office infrastructure and staff connectivity. We provide the hardware, software, and access to resources that allow staff to achieve their goals. We operate in 10 different countries, providing 24/7 support to all Agoda employees. Whether in the office, working remotely, or traveling, we enable everyone to stay connected. The GSD team uses state-of-the-art cloud management technologies combined with the best on-site services to manage the latest hardware running Windows, macOS, and Linux.
   

  

**Location: This role will be based in Bangkok, Kuala Lumpur or Gurgaon.**
* Bangkok: Full relocation support will be provided by Agoda.
* Kuala Lumpur & Gurgaon: Applicants must already be eligible to work locally (citizens or holders of valid work authorization).


**The Opportunity:**
 As a Workday Payroll Specialist, you will serve as the primary expert ensuring our core Payroll processes operate seamlessly, with a focus on scaling and enhancing the setup in alignment with organizational requirements. While Payroll will be your core area, you will also contribute across other domains and additional HRIS platforms to strengthen our overall People Technology foundation.
   

  

 You’ll partner closely with People and IT teams to deliver scalable solutions, optimize existing processes, and explore new ways Workday and other tools can bring value to the organization.
   

  

 If you’re someone who enjoys solving complex problems, thrives in a collaborative environment, and is eager to expand your skills beyond Workday, this role will give you the platform to do just that.
   

  

 This role will be based in Bangkok and relocation will be provided.
   

  

**In this Role, you'll get to:**
* Configure, maintain, and support Workday Payroll interfaces/outputs, including functional setup for PECI
* Partner closely with Payroll stakeholders and vendors to align on requirements, mapping, cutoffs, exception handling, and ongoing operational improvements
* Build and maintain Workday payroll reporting (Advanced Reports, Calculated Fields, dashboards)
* Support Workday-side troubleshooting during payroll cycles, including investigating data issues, supporting file generation/extract issues, and collaborating on root-cause analysis with integration/vendor teams
* Own documentation and enablement for Workday payroll processes, including control checklists, mapping notes, SOPs, and knowledge transfer to strengthen team resiliency.
* Stay current on Workday releases and recommend enhancements/automation to reduce payroll cycle time, defects, and manual effort on the Workday side


**What you'll Need to Succeed:**
* 4 - 6 years of hands-on Workday experience, with at least 2–3 years supporting payroll-related Workday delivery and third-party payroll providers
* Hands-on experience with Workday PECI and/or EPI (per your environment): managing extracts/outputs, effective-dated events, filters, timing, and operational support
* Strong proficiency in Workday reporting for payroll (Advanced Reporting, Calculated Fields), creating reliable outputs for readiness checks, reconciliation support, and audit needs
* Solid understanding of payroll input drivers in Workday (HCM/Comp/Time/Absence impacts), especially effective dating, retroactivity implications, and data integrity
* Working knowledge of Workday Security and handling sensitive payroll-related data with appropriate controls
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills: data tracing, root-cause analysis, and clear communication of findings/impacts to Payroll stakeholders
* Strong collaboration skills and stakeholder management; comfortable operating as the Workday owner while partnering tightly with Payroll and vendors


**It's Great if you have:**
* Understanding of how Workday data typically feeds into downstream systems (payroll providers like Cloudpay/ADP) and what validations/cutoffs are commonly required
* Familiarity with integration/support practices: monitoring, scheduling, secure file transfer coordination, incident management, and change control.
* Experience supporting multi-country payroll inputs from Workday (global complexity, localization considerations.
* Experience in payroll-related testing: UAT support, regression support for Workday changes, parallel run support (Workday outputs and validation reports)


**What you'll get:**
* Medical, dental, mental health support line, annual leave, travel discounts, sick days, and the AgodaChoice flexible spending benefit
* Provident fund benefits, and life insurance
* Flexibility to help you work in the way that's best for you with a work from home allowance, 30-day work from anywhere benefit, and hybrid working options.
* Unlimited online learning access, several in-person development programs for each stage of your career, and career paths for management and individual contributors
* The chance to live in Bangkok, one of the best cities in Southeast Asia and a central hub for travel. Within 3 hours you can hit any of the most popular countries like Vietnam, Singapore, Laos, Malaysia, and Hong Kong, just to name a few.
* A generous relocation package to help you get here comfortably.

title: HIL Engineer - Embedded by Quokka
description:
We’re really happy you found your way to Embedded by Quokka – whether it was through a colleague, a project you’ve worked on, or simply your curiosity about where HIL development is heading next.
  
At Quokka, we believe that great technology starts with great people. People who are curious. People who care. People who enjoy solving complex challenges together – and who like working close to the customer to make real impact.
  
Now we’re looking for a HIL Engineer to join our team and help shape the future of test environments for our clients.
  
  

About the role
  
This position is an internal role, where you will take the lead in developing and driving Quokka’s HIL capabilities forward. You’ll be the one shaping our approach, building structures, and supporting both colleagues and customers with your expertise.
  
To succeed in this role, you need to be comfortable communicating in both Swedish and English, as you’ll collaborate with customers, suppliers, and internal teams.
  
  

Who we’re looking for
  
You have experience designing, developing, or maintaining Hardware‑in‑the‑Loop systems, and you enjoy working hands‑on with both hardware and software. You’re comfortable meeting customers, understanding their needs, and turning those needs into smart, reliable HIL solutions.
  
You like being the person who connects the dots — between requirements, architecture, test needs, and real‑world system behavior.
  
  

**We think you’ll thrive if you have experience with:**  

Designing or developing HIL systems (dSPACE, Vector, NI, or similar)
  
  

Hardware integration, signal interfaces, I/O, and test rigs
  
  

Test automation or scripting (Python, CAPL, or similar)
  
  

Reading and understanding embedded software behavior
  
  

Debugging, troubleshooting, and system‑level thinking
  
  

Communication protocols such as CAN, LIN, SPI, I2C, UART
  
  

**Bonus points for experience with:**  

Customer‑facing roles or technical coordination
  
  

Automotive or safety‑critical systems
  
  

Requirements handling and traceability
  
  

Continuous integration or test automation pipelines
  
  

And if you enjoy explaining complex things in a simple way — both to customers and colleagues — you’ll fit right in.
  
A valid driver’s license (B) is also required, as some customer visits and on‑site work will be part of the role.
  
  

Your role
  
  

**As a HIL Designer at Quokka, you will:**  

Work closely with customers to understand their systems and test needs
  
  

Design and develop HIL solutions that support reliable, efficient testing
  
  

Integrate hardware, software, and tools into complete test environments
  
  

Troubleshoot issues and guide teams toward root causes
  
  

Collaborate with developers, testers, and system engineers
  
  

Help shape long‑term test strategies and improvements
  
  

You’ll be part of a team that values openness, curiosity, and a bit of fun along the way.
  
  

Who we are
  
At Quokka, we bring together specialists across embedded systems, digital solutions, and electrification to help our clients build products that truly matter. Our values — Care, Joy, Curiosity, Innovation — guide how we work with each other and with our customers.
  
We believe in people first, technology second. Because when the right people work together, great things happen.
  
  

Apply now!
  
If this feels like the right place for you, we’d love to hear from you. We’re excited to get to know you.
  
Note, as part of our recruitment process, we conduct background checks on our final candidates. This is a standard step to ensure a safe and reliable hiring process for everyone involved.
  
If you have any questions regarding the position or recruitment process, feel free to reach out to Stina Johansson, Business Unit Manager for Embedded by Quokka.
  
**Email:** stina.johansson@quokka.se Phone: 076 004 50 03

title: Functional Safety Engineer
description:
Functional Safety Engineer – Automotive (Embedded Systems)
  
**Location:** Gothenburg, Sweden
  
**Experience:** 10+ Years
  
Role Overview
  
We are seeking a highly experienced Functional Safety Engineer to lead and deliver system-level safety activities for automotive embedded systems. The role involves ensuring compliance with ISO 26262 and OEM safety standards, particularly within exterior lighting systems.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
* Plan, lead, and execute Functional Safety activities across the development lifecycle.
* Conduct HARA, SACA, FSC, TSC, PRSP, PRST and develop safety concepts.
* Prepare and maintain OEM-aligned safety documentation using OEM templates.
* Ensure compliance with ISO 26262 and related milestones.
* Manage milestone-based releases using Teamcenter.
* Support development and release phases across project teams.
* Coordinate with OEM stakeholders, software teams, and competence centers.
* Support exterior lighting development across different platforms.
* Participate in verification, confirmation reviews, and Functional Safety Assessments.
* Maintain and improve safety processes, maps, and working methodologies.


Required Skills & Expertise
  
* Strong expertise in ISO 26262 Functional Safety.
* Hands-on experience with HARA, FSC, TSC, SACA, PRSP, PRST.
* Experience in automotive embedded systems.
* Familiarity with OEM processes and Teamcenter.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


Preferred Qualifications
  
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical / Electronics / Automotive Engineering.
* TÜV ISO 26262 certification is a plus.
* Experience in exterior lighting systems is desirable.

title: Mechatronics Design Engineer
description:
**Take the lead in driving innovation**  

At Volvo Cars, we are committed to advancing safety, sustainability and electrification. To achieve our ambitious goals, we are looking for forward-thinking individuals who can identify challenges before they arise and deliver cutting-edge solutions that set new industry standards.  

  

When you choose a career with Volvo Cars, you’re not just joining a company – you’re helping shape the future of mobility.

**Let's introduce ourselves**
-----------------------------



At Volvo Cars, we are shaping the future of mobility through innovation, sustainability, and technology designed around people. Within Concept Centre, part of Engineering Operations, we turn ideas into reality by developing concept vehicles, prototypes, and advanced engineering solutions. Our team combines expertise in electronics, software, and mechatronics to create the technologies that will define the next generation of Volvo Cars.


**What you'll do**
------------------



Develop (time, technique, cost) new or improved mechatronics product modules, components, systems, design aspects or functions, using computer-assisted technology and/or leading development tasks internally or at supplier. Responsibilities includes ensuring test and verification of systems or components.

  

**Responsibilities include:**

  

* **Product and Solution Development:** Support others by carrying out a range of product development and engineering activities, such as analyzing client situations or interpreting data.
* **Engineering Solutions Design:** Implement feasibility testing of proposed engineering solutions, under supervision, to provide feedback and contribute to validation of the design.
* **Technical Troubleshooting:** Conduct routine tasks in technical troubleshooting, which include basic diagnostic and simple problem-solving tasks related to equipment and experiments.
* **Technical Developments Recommendation:** Research and suggest technical developments to improve the quality of the website/portal/software and supporting infrastructure to better meet usersï¿½ needs.
* **Engineering Drawings:** Carry out a range of activities under the guidance of more senior colleagues to create engineering drawings for the communication, evaluation, and implementation of engineering solutions.
**What you'll bring**
---------------------



You are a curious and hands-on engineer who enjoys solving complex technical challenges and turning concepts into reality. You are comfortable working across multiple disciplines and thrive in collaborative environments where innovation, learning, and continuous improvement are part of everyday work.

  

* A degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics, Computer Engineering, or equivalent experience.
* Experience in electronics, embedded systems, software development, and electrical schematic design.
* Programming skills in languages such as C/C++, Python, Java, or similar.
* Strong communication, collaboration, and technical documentation skills.
* Experience with automotive systems, Linux, Android development, CAD tools, lighting technologies, or prototype development is considered an advantage.
  


**Volvo Cars. For Life.**  

For nearly a century, Volvo Cars has empowered people to move freely in a personal, sustainable and safe way. Today, we are driving bold advancements in electrification, sustainability and automotive safety. To realise our ambitious vision, we are seeking innovative minds who are ready to tackle the challenges of tomorrow – today.  

  

In our company, we believe extraordinary things are achieved by ordinary people with the drive to make a difference.
  

  

**Ready to take the next step?**  

Submit your CV in English and tell us why you’re the ideal candidate for a new role at Volvo Cars. Applications must be received no later than [XXth of XX XXX]. We are prioritising direct applications to ensure a fair and efficient application process.  

  

We welcome your application!

  


#LI-DNI

title: Automotive Embedded Software Verification Engineer to Accenture Industry X
description:
Accenture is hiring an **Automotive Embedded Software Verification Engineer** to strengthen our automotive team in Gothenburg.


This role combines **on-site customer support** with **hands-on embedded software testing** across SiL, HiL and ViL environments. In this role you will ensure software quality by both validating it in automated test pipelines and representing the team directly at customer site. This role requires frequent presence at client premises in Gothenburg, thus we look for candidates having existing working permit/rights in Sweden or right to work in EU.


Industry X is Accenture’s capability focused on engineering and manufacturing transformation — it’s about how products are designed, built, connected, and operated across their entire lifecycle.

 **What You’ll Do**

* Write and maintain automated test cases using a Pytest based framework
* Perform testing across components, integration and system levels
* Execute and debug tests in SiL, HiL and ViL environments
* Analyse test results, logs and measurement data to identify defects
* Debug issues in collaboration with SW developers
* Maintain test data, configurations and parameterization
* As on-site customer interface, serve as on-site technical liaison; support integration, verification and vehicle testing at customer facilities
* Facilitate rapid issue identification, debugging and resolution; communicate feedback to development teams
* Provide hands-on support for software flashing, configuration, milestone reviews and technical workshops

  

**Primary skills for the role:**

* 5 or more years in embedded software, including experience in testing embedded software (SIL, HIL, ViL), customer-facing roles
* C++ proficiency
* Expertise in Pytest and Python-based test automation
* Understanding of embedded systems and ECU architecture
* CI/CD: GitHub, GitHub Actions
* Experience with debugging tools and log/trace analysis
* Testing experience in one or more: CAN/LIN/Ethernet protocols, Diagnostics, OBD, Security, Functional Safety
* Strong SOC/MCU software integration knowledge
* Good communication skills; fluent English

**Nice if you have also some of these skills:**

* Experience with functional safety (ISO 26262) and cybersecurity frameworks
* Familiarity with automotive development processes (ASPICE, AUTOSAR)
* Additional scripting/automation skills (Bash, etc.)

**What we can offer you**

* Competitive compensation and benefits
* Flexible work hours with a good work-life balance
* Significant development opportunities and support for progressing in your professional career.
* Rich opportunities to develop your business acumen, consulting toolbox, industry knowledge, technical and professional skills.
* Meaningful and exciting client projects
* A phenomenal opportunity through working with a great variation of projects and industries.
* A dedicated mentor following your career journey and a strong learning culture.
* Responsibility, trust, and an inclusive work environment
* The opportunity to get involved in Accenture´s volunteering, Women in Tech, sport- and social groups.
* Access to industry and capability specialists in all corners of the world with outstanding international knowledge and experience
* A good and inclusive working environment, where you will work with inspiring and skilled colleagues and managers.

***Ready to join us?*** *Apply now by sending your CV and relevant certificates.*

title: Audio System Engineer – Analytics, Lund
description:
**Job Title**
-------------


Audio System Engineer – Analytics, Lund**Job Description**
-------------------

*Are you passionate about audio and eager to shape the next generation of intelligent audio solutions? As an Audio System Engineer – Analytics at Axis Communications, you'll design and develop cutting-edge audio analytics that complement our world-leading video technology. Join us at our Lund HQ and turn your innovative ideas into products that make a real difference.*

**Your future team**


You will join our Product Audio development team — a cross-functional group of software audio engineers, acoustical engineers, electronics engineers, and mechanical engineers. Together, the team acts as Axis's audio competence hub, delivering world-class audio solutions for a growing number of network devices. You'll collaborate closely across disciplines, and your contributions will directly shape the audio capabilities of our products.

**What you'll do here as Audio System Engineer – Analytics**


Your work will power the next era of intelligent audio in our security systems. You'll bridge audio analytics research and product development, ensuring that innovative concepts become robust, production-ready solutions.

* Develop new audio analytics solutions that enhance Axis's intelligent security offerings
* Design and implement Digital Signal Processing (DSP) algorithms for audio applications
* Participate in product projects, leading and coordinating the audio workstream
* Evaluate and validate audio solutions throughout the product development lifecycle
* Collaborate with software, acoustical, electronics, and mechanical engineers to deliver integrated audio experiences
* Contribute to defining requirements and concepts for future audio capabilities

**Who are you?**


You are curious, collaborative, and motivated by seeing your ideas evolve into products that reach customers around the world. You enjoy working across disciplines and are comfortable taking ownership of the audio workstream within product projects. You communicate clearly, share your knowledge openly, and thrive in a team that values both quality and innovation.


We'd love to hear that you have:

* Master's degree in Electronics, Computer Science, Engineering Mathematics, or a similar field — or equivalent experience
* Demonstrated experience in audio system design, covering the full lifecycle from concept to production
* Experience developing audio analytics solutions
* Fluency in English


Bonus points if you also bring:

* Working knowledge of acoustics and loudspeaker characteristics
* Solid understanding of Digital Signal Processing (DSP) concepts and their implementation in audio applications
* Comfortable communicating in Swedish

**What Axis has to offer**  

We are a world leader in network video, where cutting-edge technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide. As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.

*Our Lund HQ Campus, including the impressive Grenden building, offers a dynamic environment with spaces crafted to encourage collaboration, whether through informal “**fika**” chats, formal meetings,* *or after-hours activities.* *Check it out:* *Axis HQ*


Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, wellness allowance, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.


To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:  

Life at Axis blog  

Engineering at Axis blog  

Innovation at Axis

**Ready to Act?**  

Axis is a company realizing the benefits of a diverse workforce. We know that diversity in groups creates a better working environment and promotes creativity, something that is fundamental for our success. We welcome all applications.


We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!


In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Peter Wahlberg, +46 701710068.

**Type of Employment**
----------------------


Permanent Employment**Posting End Date**
--------------------


2026-06-30*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* *Notice will be provided before we take any action.*

**About Axis Communications**
-----------------------------


We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.


With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**

For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.


Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast

title: Research Engineer to BioMS Lund
description:
Lund University was founded in 1666 and is repeatedly ranked among the world’s top universities. The University has around 46 000 students and 8 500 staff based in Lund, Helsingborg and Malmö. We are united in our efforts to understand, explain and improve our world and the human condition.

**Description of the workplace**  

The Structural Proteomics unit at BioMS Lund is a part of the SciLifeLab Integrated structural biology platform https://www.scilifelab.se/structural-biology/. The unit provides access to cutting-edge equipment and expertise, for the analysis of protein interactions and conformational dynamics of proteins using mass spectrometry. The structural proteomics unit does contract research for scientist and companies in Sweden and EU where our main analysis techniques are Hydrogen/Deuterium Exchange - (HDX) and Crosslinking Mass Spectrometry. We are a national Swedish infrastructure that provides research services that can provide insight into the function of macromolecules to generate increased understanding of diseases. The unit is funded by the SciLifeLab, the Swedish Research Council (BioMS) and Lund University.

**What we offer**  

Lund University is a public authority, which means that you will have special benefits, generous annual leave and an advantageous occupational pension. We also have a flexitime agreement that creates good conditions for work/life balance. Read more on the University’s website about being a Lund University employee, Work at Lund University

**Work duties and areas of responsibility**  

We are looking for a research engineer that will be a part of our team. The main work will be performing HDX-MS in a structural proteomics context, i.e. wet lab work and mass spectrometry, followed by data analysis, integration and visualization of data for users of the infrastructure. We envision that you are experienced in this field and directly can take on this difficult/qualified work.

**Qualifications**  

The requirements for the position are:

* Very good communication skills in both spoken and written English and Swedish.
* Practical experience working with hydrogen/deuterium exchange mass spectrometry (HDX-MS).
* Experience from working in a research infrastructure or within a research group in the field of structural biology.
* Documented computer skills relevant for structural biology, such as PyMOL, Chimera, AlphaFold, GROMACS or comparable software, i.e. experience in using such tools for data analysis and visualization in reports or publications.
* Knowledge of AI/ML methods in a structural biology context.


Meritorious qualifications

* Experience of project management and communication with external users/customers.
* Documented ability to communicate scientific results and knowledge to non-specialists and students.
* A Master’s degree in Engineering or a related field.


We are looking for someone who is detail-oriented, self-driven, and able to work independently with minimal supervision. You should have the ability to work at a high pace and make agile decisions based on evidence, balancing speed, quality, and risk.  

A strong commitment to delivering high-quality results, overcoming challenges, and focusing on what creates value is essential. You are motivated to continuously develop, learn new skills, build competence, and share knowledge. You are collaborative and open-minded in your way of working.

**Further information**  

This is a permanent full-time position (100%), with a start date of 1 September 2026 or as agreed. A six-month probationary period may be applied.

**How to apply**  

Applications are submitted through the university’s recruitment system. The application must include a cover letter describing how you meet the qualification requirements and why you are interested in the position. The application should also include a CV as well as any other documents you wish to submit (copies of degree certificates, transcripts, contact details for references, letters of recommendation, etc.).

  

The Faculty of Medicine is a part of Lund University, and is responsible for education and research within medicine and healthcare. Our academic programs are closely linked with the healthcare system and are firmly anchored in the faculty’s strong research tradition. Our research spans a broad field within experimental preclinical research, near-patient clinical research and health sciences research. The Faculty of Medicine, with its 1,800 employees and 2,700 students in Lund and Malmö, is a knowledge-intensive meeting place for students, teachers and researchers from all over the world.


We kindly decline all sales and marketing contacts.
